examTitle: AWS Certified DevOps Engineer - Professional (DOP-C02) Mock Exam

questions.question: A company runs a production web application on Amazon ECS with the EC2 launch type. The DevOps team needs to deploy new versions with zero downtime and the ability to quickly roll back if a critical bug is detected. Which deployment strategy is MOST appropriate?

options.text: Use CodeDeploy with the in-place deployment configuration and CodeDeployDefault.AllAtOnce
Use CodeDeploy with the blue/green deployment configuration and CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes
Use Elastic Beanstalk with the All-at-Once deployment policy
Manually stop all ECS tasks and start new tasks with the updated image

questions.explanation: Blue/Green deployment với CodeDeploy cho ECS tạo task set mới song song, dịch chuyển traffic dần qua ALB listener và cho phép rollback nhanh bằng cách trỏ lại task set cũ. CodeDeployDefault.ECSLinear10PercentEvery1Minutes shift 10% traffic mỗi phút, an toàn cho production. In-place AllAtOnce gây downtime; Beanstalk All-at-Once cũng gây downtime; manual stop/start không có rollback nhanh.

questions.question: A team uses AWS CodePipeline to deploy a serverless application across us-east-1 and eu-west-1. The pipeline source is in us-east-1, but the deployment stage must deploy to both regions. What is the MOST efficient way to implement this?

options.text: Create two separate pipelines, one in each region, and trigger them via EventBridge
Use a single pipeline in us-east-1 with cross-region action and create an artifact bucket in eu-west-1
Use CodeBuild to copy artifacts manually to eu-west-1 before deployment
Create a pipeline in us-east-1 and use AWS DataSync to replicate artifacts to eu-west-1

questions.explanation: CodePipeline hỗ trợ cross-region actions native. Chỉ cần khai báo action với region khác và cung cấp artifact bucket ở region đó. CodePipeline tự copy artifact sang. Hai pipeline tách biệt khó đồng bộ; CodeBuild thủ công là anti-pattern; DataSync không phù hợp.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer is configuring a CodeBuild project that needs to access an RDS database in a private subnet. What configuration is required?

options.text: Configure the CodeBuild project to run in the same VPC, subnets, and security groups as the RDS instance
Attach an Internet Gateway to the CodeBuild project so it can reach the RDS endpoint
Use a NAT Gateway in the public subnet to allow CodeBuild to connect to the database
Move the RDS database to a public subnet temporarily during the build

questions.explanation: CodeBuild có VPC support: gán project vào VPC + private subnet + security group cho phép connect tới RDS. CodeBuild ENI sẽ được tạo trong subnet đó. Internet Gateway không phải để truy cập tài nguyên private; NAT chỉ dùng cho outbound internet; chuyển RDS public là sai bảo mật.

questions.question: A company uses AWS CodeDeploy for Lambda function deployments. They want to deploy a new version with traffic shifting: 10% for 5 minutes, then 100%. If CloudWatch alarms trigger, deployment must automatically roll back. Which configuration steps are required? (Select TWO)

options.text: Configure CloudWatch alarms in the CodeDeploy deployment group with automatic rollback enabled
Use S3 event notifications to monitor deployment progress

questions.explanation: Canary deployment shift 10% rồi 100% sau N phút, đúng yêu cầu. Linear shift đều theo % mỗi khoảng (khác với canary). Trong deployment group bật alarm-based rollback để tự động roll back khi alarm fire. S3 events không liên quan.

questions.question: An application is deployed using Elastic Beanstalk. The team needs to deploy frequent updates with absolute zero downtime, even during the deployment process, and they have budget for additional capacity. Which deployment policy is BEST?
questions.explanation: Immutable deploy tạo Auto Scaling Group mới song song với version cũ, chỉ swap khi mới healthy → zero downtime + rollback đơn giản (xóa ASG mới). Rolling reduces capacity tạm thời; Rolling with Additional Batch giảm tác động nhưng vẫn có overlap. All at Once gây downtime.

questions.question: A DevOps team uses CodeCommit for source control. Developers in another AWS account need read-only access to a specific repository. What is the MOST secure approach?

options.text: Create IAM users in the CodeCommit account and share credentials with the other account's developers
Create an IAM role in the CodeCommit account with codecommit:Get* and codecommit:List* permissions and allow the other account to assume it
Make the repository public and provide the HTTPS clone URL
Use CodeCommit triggers to copy the repository to S3 and share the bucket

questions.explanation: Cross-account access nên dùng IAM role với trust policy cho phép account khác AssumeRole, kèm permission read-only. Sharing credentials vi phạm best practice. CodeCommit không có khái niệm public repo. Copy ra S3 phá vỡ workflow Git.

questions.question: In a CodeDeploy deployment for EC2, the team wants to run database migration scripts BEFORE the new application version starts receiving traffic. Which lifecycle hook should be used?
questions.explanation: BeforeAllowTraffic chạy sau khi cài đặt nhưng trước khi load balancer cho phép traffic vào instance mới — đúng để chạy migration cuối cùng. ApplicationStop trước khi stop app cũ; BeforeInstall trước khi copy file; ValidateService sau khi traffic đã được allow (để verify).

questions.question: A team builds a CI pipeline that needs to run unit tests, build a Docker image, and push it to Amazon ECR. The buildspec.yaml needs to have phases in the correct order. Which sequence is correct?
questions.explanation: Thứ tự chuẩn của CodeBuild buildspec: install (cài runtime, deps) → pre_build (login ECR, run tests) → build (docker build) → post_build (docker push, write image definition). Sai thứ tự sẽ fail.

questions.question: An organization wants to enforce that all CodeCommit pull requests are approved by at least 2 reviewers before they can be merged. What feature should be used?

options.text: Create an IAM policy that denies the GitPush action unless 2 tags are set
Create an approval rule template and associate it with the repository, requiring 2 approvers
Use CodePipeline manual approval action before the merge stage
Use a Lambda function triggered by CodeCommit events to validate approvers

questions.explanation: CodeCommit có Approval Rule Templates: định nghĩa số approver tối thiểu, gắn vào repo, áp dụng cho mọi PR. Đây là native feature, không cần Lambda hay IAM hack. CodePipeline manual approval áp dụng cho pipeline stage, không phải PR.

questions.question: A team deploys Lambda functions using SAM. Each deployment must run integration tests against the new version, and if tests fail, traffic must NOT shift to the new version. Which approach satisfies this?

options.text: Use CodeDeploy with PreTraffic and PostTraffic Lambda hooks; place integration tests in PreTraffic hook
Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate the deployment and test sequence
Add tests in the CodeBuild post_build phase before the CodeDeploy stage
Configure CloudWatch alarms only — they will automatically roll back if errors increase

questions.explanation: CodeDeploy cho Lambda hỗ trợ hooks: BeforeAllowTraffic (PreTraffic) chạy validation function trước khi shift traffic; nếu fail thì deployment fail và không shift. PostTraffic chạy sau khi shift xong. Tests trong build phase chạy trước deploy, không validate version mới đã deploy.

questions.question: A company uses AWS CodeArtifact to manage internal Python packages. They want to ensure developers only consume approved packages from PyPI, and any new external package must be reviewed before being usable. Which configuration achieves this?

options.text: Disable the PyPI upstream repository entirely
Use CodeArtifact package origin controls to block direct uploads and prevent automatic ingestion from upstream
Set the repository to private and require IAM permissions for read access
Use S3 bucket policies on the underlying CodeArtifact bucket

questions.explanation: CodeArtifact package origin controls cho phép chặn ingestion từ upstream (PyPI) trừ khi admin allow từng package — đúng pattern cho review trước khi consume. Disable PyPI hoàn toàn quá strict; private repo không kiểm soát upstream; S3 bucket policy không expose ra.

questions.question: A team uses CodePipeline with multiple environments (dev, staging, prod). They want prod deployment to require manual approval and the approver must verify a CloudWatch dashboard before approving. What is the BEST approach?

options.text: Add a Manual Approval action in the prod stage and include the CloudWatch dashboard URL in the action's URL field
Use a Lambda invoke action that emails the dashboard image and waits for SES reply
Stop the pipeline at staging and create a new pipeline for prod manually
Use S3 source action to require uploading a signed approval file before continuing

questions.explanation: Manual Approval action có field URL for review để link tới CloudWatch dashboard / Grafana / runbook. Approver vào console, xem link, rồi approve. Pattern chuẩn và native. Lambda email approval phức tạp; tạo pipeline mới là sai pattern; S3 file approval không phải feature CodePipeline.

questions.question: A Lambda function is deployed with versioning enabled. The team uses alias 'prod' pointing to version 5 (95%) and version 6 (5%) for canary testing. Errors spike on version 6. What is the FASTEST rollback method?

options.text: Delete version 6 entirely from the Lambda console
Update the prod alias to route 100% traffic to version 5
Rebuild and redeploy version 5 as version 7

questions.explanation: Lambda alias hỗ trợ weighted routing. Để rollback ngay, update routing config: version 5 = 100%, version 6 = 0%. Một API call duy nhất. Xóa version có thể fail nếu đang chạy; concurrency = 0 cũng được nhưng làm error 429; redeploy mất thời gian build.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer needs to run a CodeBuild job triggered on every commit to the main branch of a GitHub repository (not CodeCommit). What is the MOST efficient setup?

options.text: Use a Lambda function polling GitHub API every 5 minutes and triggering CodeBuild
Configure a CodeBuild webhook with FILE_PATH and BRANCH filters in the project source settings
Use AWS CodeStar to mirror GitHub to CodeCommit and trigger on CodeCommit events
Use CodePipeline with a GitHub v1 source action and CloudWatch scheduled rule

questions.explanation: CodeBuild có native GitHub webhook support với filter groups (event = PUSH, branch = main). GitHub gọi webhook khi có commit, CodeBuild chạy ngay — không cần polling. Lambda poll API là anti-pattern; mirror sang CodeCommit phức tạp; scheduled rule không phải event-driven.

questions.question: A company uses CodePipeline to deploy a CloudFormation stack. After the CREATE_CHANGE_SET action, the pipeline should pause for approval, then execute the change set only if approved. What is the correct action sequence?
questions.explanation: Đúng pattern: tạo change set (xem trước thay đổi), pause cho người duyệt, sau đó execute nếu OK. CloudFormation action types trong CodePipeline có: CHANGE_SET_REPLACE/CREATE, CHANGE_SET_EXECUTE, CREATE_UPDATE, DELETE_ONLY, REPLACE_ON_FAILURE.

questions.question: A team builds container images using CodeBuild and pushes to ECR. They need image vulnerability scanning to block the pipeline if critical vulnerabilities are found. What is the BEST approach?

options.text: Enable ECR Enhanced Scanning, use EventBridge to trigger a Lambda that fails the CodePipeline action when CRITICAL findings exist
Run Trivy in the CodeBuild build phase and exit with non-zero code on critical findings
Use Amazon Inspector to scan the EC2 build host
Use GuardDuty to scan the image after push

questions.explanation: ECR Enhanced Scanning (powered by Inspector) scan continuous + emit findings tới EventBridge. Lambda đọc finding, gọi PutJobFailureResult để fail action trong pipeline. Trivy in-build cũng work nhưng kém integrated; Inspector EC2 host không scan image; GuardDuty không scan container image (GuardDuty for ECR runtime is malware behavior detection).

questions.question: A DevOps engineer wants to share artifacts between two CodeBuild projects in a pipeline. Project A produces a JAR file that Project B needs to test. What is the recommended way?

options.text: Project A uploads the JAR to a personal S3 bucket; Project B downloads via aws s3 cp
Use the artifacts section in buildspec.yaml to output files, and pass between actions as CodePipeline input/output artifacts
Mount a shared EFS volume on both CodeBuild projects
Email the JAR file between build phases

questions.explanation: CodePipeline quản lý artifacts qua artifact store (S3 bucket). Project A output artifact → Project B input artifact. Pipeline tự download/upload, có versioning, encryption. Tự quản lý S3 phức tạp và sai pattern; EFS overkill; email là joke.

questions.question: A company manages 50 AWS accounts in an AWS Organization. They want to deploy a baseline CloudFormation stack (IAM roles, S3 logging bucket) to all accounts in 3 regions. What is the MOST efficient method?

options.text: Use CloudFormation StackSets with service-managed permissions and deploy to the organization root
Create 50 separate CloudFormation stacks manually in each account
Use AWS Config conformance packs with a custom rule for each resource
Write a Python script using boto3 to iterate accounts and deploy stacks

questions.explanation: StackSets với service-managed permissions tích hợp với Organizations: deploy 1 lần tới root/OU, cover mọi account + region. Khi có account mới được add vào OU, stack tự deploy. Phương án còn lại đều thủ công, không scale.

questions.question: A CloudFormation template needs to reference the VPC ID from another stack in the same account/region without using parameter passing. Which intrinsic function should be used?
questions.explanation: Fn::ImportValue đọc output đã export bằng Outputs.Export.Name trong stack khác. Đây là cross-stack reference chuẩn. Fn::GetAtt lấy attribute của resource trong cùng stack; Fn::Sub là string substitution; Ref tham chiếu parameter/resource trong cùng stack.

questions.question: A team uses CloudFormation to manage infrastructure. They suspect an engineer manually modified an S3 bucket policy outside of CloudFormation. How can they detect this drift?

options.text: Run CloudFormation drift detection on the stack
Use AWS Config rules to check the resource against the template
Compare CloudTrail logs against the template
Re-run UpdateStack with the same template

questions.explanation: CloudFormation Drift Detection so sánh trạng thái thực tế của resource với template, báo MODIFIED/DELETED/IN_SYNC. Có thể chạy ad-hoc hoặc định kỳ qua EventBridge. Config rules có thể bổ trợ nhưng không native cho drift; re-update sẽ overwrite (nguy hiểm).

questions.question: A DevOps team uses AWS SAM to deploy serverless applications. They need to test the API Gateway + Lambda locally before deploying. Which SAM command should they use?
questions.explanation: sam local start-api spins up một local API Gateway emulator + invoke Lambda trong Docker container, dùng template.yaml local. Test endpoint qua localhost:3000. Các command khác không đúng mục đích.

questions.question: A team wants application configuration (feature flags, tuning parameters) to be updated independently of code deployment, with safe rollout (canary) and automatic rollback if errors spike. Which AWS service is BEST suited?
questions.explanation: AppConfig được thiết kế đúng cho use case feature flag / dynamic config: deployment strategy (linear, all-at-once, custom), validator (JSON schema, Lambda), monitor CloudWatch alarm để auto rollback. SSM Parameter Store chỉ là key-value store, không có deployment strategy. Secrets Manager cho secrets. Service Catalog cho self-service infra.

questions.question: A company uses AWS CDK (TypeScript) to define infrastructure. The team needs to synthesize the templates and review CloudFormation changes before deployment. Which sequence is correct?

options.text: cdk init → cdk deploy → cdk diff
cdk synth → cdk diff → cdk deploy
cdk deploy → cdk synth → cdk diff
cdk bootstrap → cdk deploy → cdk synth

questions.explanation: cdk synth tạo CFN template từ TS code; cdk diff so sánh stack hiện tại với template mới (preview thay đổi); cdk deploy apply. cdk bootstrap chỉ chạy 1 lần để setup CDK staging resources, không phải step thường xuyên.

questions.question: A CloudFormation stack creates an EC2 instance and a security group. When the stack is deleted, the security group fails to delete because another resource references it. How can you prevent unintended deletion in production?

options.text: Add DeletionPolicy: Retain on the security group resource
Enable termination protection on the stack
Use UpdateReplacePolicy: Delete on the security group
Add a CloudFormation Stack Policy denying Update:* on the resource

questions.explanation: Termination protection trên stack ngăn DELETE accidental — phải tắt protection trước khi delete. DeletionPolicy: Retain để lại resource nhưng stack vẫn delete được; UpdateReplacePolicy: Delete làm ngược lại; Stack Policy không chặn delete stack.

questions.question: A team wants to deploy the same web application stack to multiple AWS accounts using CloudFormation StackSets. Which permission models are valid? (Select TWO)

options.text: S3 bucket policy for cross-account template access

questions.explanation: StackSets có 2 permission models: self-managed (tạo 2 role thủ công ở admin + target accounts) và service-managed (tự động qua Organizations trusted access). IAM Identity Center và S3 policy không liên quan.

questions.question: A Step Functions workflow processes orders. One state calls a Lambda that may throw a temporary network error. The workflow should retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff. How is this configured?

options.text: Add a Retry field on the Task state with ErrorEquals, MaxAttempts: 3, IntervalSeconds, and BackoffRate
Wrap the Lambda call in a try/catch inside the Lambda code
Use a Wait state followed by a Choice state to loop
Configure CloudWatch alarm on Lambda errors and restart Step Functions

questions.explanation: Step Functions Task state có Retry field built-in: ErrorEquals (vd: Lambda.ServiceException, States.TaskFailed), IntervalSeconds, BackoffRate, MaxAttempts. Native, không cần code retry. Try/catch trong Lambda chỉ xử lý error nội bộ; Wait/Choice loop tự build phức tạp.

questions.question: A company provides developers self-service ability to launch standardized EC2 environments with pre-approved AMIs and instance types, while enforcing tagging and budget limits. Which AWS service is designed for this?
questions.explanation: Service Catalog cung cấp portfolio + product (CFN template) với constraint (launch role, tag, budget) để dev self-service trong khuôn khổ. Proton dành cho platform engineering (template lifecycle); Control Tower Account Factory tạo account mới; SSM Automation là runbook tự động hóa.

questions.question: A CloudFormation template has an EC2 resource. When the AMI ID changes, CloudFormation replaces the instance, causing downtime. How can you minimize disruption during the replacement?

options.text: Add CreationPolicy with ResourceSignal to wait for application readiness
Add UpdatePolicy with AutoScalingRollingUpdate (only valid if behind an ASG)
Add DeletionPolicy: Snapshot to the EC2 resource
Use Fn::ForEach to deploy two instances

questions.explanation: UpdatePolicy chỉ hỗ trợ trên AWS::AutoScalingGroup, AWS::Lambda::Alias, AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer, AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup, AWS::OpenSearchService::Domain. Pattern chuẩn là EC2 trong ASG + UpdatePolicy AutoScalingRollingUpdate để rolling update. CreationPolicy chỉ chờ signal, không tránh downtime; DeletionPolicy không liên quan update.

questions.question: A team uses CloudFormation custom resources backed by Lambda for tasks AWS doesn't natively support. The custom resource hangs at CREATE_IN_PROGRESS and never completes. What is the MOST likely cause?

options.text: The Lambda function did not send a response (success or failure) to the CloudFormation pre-signed S3 URL
The Lambda function exceeded its memory limit
The IAM role for CloudFormation does not allow lambda:InvokeFunction
The custom resource ServiceToken is incorrect

questions.explanation: Custom resource Lambda PHẢI gửi response (PUT request) tới pre-signed URL trong event để CFN tiếp tục. Nếu Lambda crash / timeout / quên gọi cfn-response, CFN chờ tới 1 giờ rồi fail. Memory limit gây Lambda crash nhưng cuối cùng error sẽ propagate. IAM sai sẽ fail ngay, không hang. ServiceToken sai cũng fail ngay.

questions.question: A team uses CloudFormation nested stacks. A change to a parameter in the parent stack should trigger update of a nested stack. How is this handled?

options.text: Manually update the nested stack template URL after each parent change
When the parent stack is updated, CloudFormation automatically propagates parameter changes to nested stacks via AWS::CloudFormation::Stack resource
Use Lambda triggered by CloudFormation events to update nested stacks
Nested stacks cannot receive updates; they must be deleted and recreated

questions.explanation: Nested stack được khai báo qua AWS::CloudFormation::Stack với TemplateURL + Parameters. Khi parent update, CFN tự update nested stack với param mới. Đây là cơ chế native của nested stack.

questions.question: A web application must achieve an RTO of 5 minutes and RPO of 1 minute across regions. Cost is a secondary concern. Which DR strategy is MOST appropriate?
questions.explanation: RTO 5 phút, RPO 1 phút là cực kỳ thấp → chỉ Multi-Site Active-Active (Hot Site) đáp ứng. Warm Standby có RTO ~10p; Pilot Light RTO 10p-1h; Backup/Restore RTO giờ-ngày. Multi-Site tốn kém nhất nhưng cost không phải concern.

questions.question: An application uses Route 53 with two regional endpoints (us-east-1 primary, us-west-2 secondary). When the primary fails its health check, traffic must automatically failover to secondary. Which routing policy should be used?
questions.explanation: Failover routing policy với 2 record (PRIMARY + SECONDARY) + health check trên primary là pattern chuẩn cho active-passive DR. Khi health check fail, Route 53 trả về secondary. Weighted không có failover; Latency dựa trên RTT; Multivalue trả nhiều record (active-active đơn giản).

questions.question: A team uses an Auto Scaling Group behind an ALB. During scale-in events, they need to drain connections gracefully and run a script to deregister the instance from an internal service registry before termination. What feature should they use?
questions.explanation: Lifecycle hook TERMINATING:WAIT giữ instance ở trạng thái Terminating:Wait, phát SQS/SNS notification để chạy automation (Lambda/SSM), sau đó complete-lifecycle-action để chuyển sang Terminating:Proceed. ALB deregistration delay chỉ drain TCP, không chạy script custom; cooldown không liên quan; user data chạy lúc launch, không lúc terminate.

questions.question: An RDS MySQL instance is Multi-AZ. The primary AZ experiences a failure. What is the expected behavior?

options.text: Read traffic continues from the standby; the DNS endpoint changes
RDS automatically fails over to the standby in another AZ; the DNS endpoint remains the same and resolves to the new primary (typically within 60-120 seconds)
The application must manually update the connection string to the standby
The standby becomes a read replica

questions.explanation: Multi-AZ là synchronous standby, không phục vụ traffic. Khi primary fail, RDS update DNS endpoint trỏ vào standby — endpoint giữ nguyên. Failover thường 60-120s. Application phải có retry logic + connection pool refresh. Read Replica là khác với Multi-AZ standby.

questions.question: A global SaaS app stores user data in DynamoDB. Users in EU and US need sub-100ms read latency from any region, and writes must replicate globally. Which feature should be enabled?

options.text: DynamoDB Streams + Lambda to copy data
Multi-Region read replicas via AWS DMS

questions.explanation: Global Tables là multi-region, multi-active replication native của DynamoDB — write ở bất kỳ region nào, replicate sang region khác trong giây. DAX chỉ cache trong 1 region; Streams + Lambda tự build replication rủi ro consistency; DMS không phù hợp cho NoSQL global.

questions.question: A DevOps team wants to test the resilience of their EKS application by randomly terminating pods during business hours. Which AWS service supports this in a controlled, safe manner?
questions.explanation: AWS FIS (chaos engineering) hỗ trợ inject failure có kiểm soát: terminate EC2/pods, stress CPU, network latency, API throttle… kèm stop conditions (CloudWatch alarm) để dừng thí nghiệm an toàn. Resilience Hub đánh giá RTO/RPO design (không inject failure); SSM Automation là runbook chung; Compute Optimizer cho rightsizing.

questions.question: An S3 bucket in us-east-1 hosts critical data. Compliance requires that within 15 minutes of any object change, an identical copy must exist in us-west-2. Which feature provides this SLA?

options.text: S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) with default settings
S3 Cross-Region Replication with Replication Time Control (RTC)
S3 Batch Replication scheduled every 15 minutes

questions.explanation: S3 RTC là SLA: 99.99% objects replicate trong 15 phút, có CloudWatch metric để monitor. CRR mặc định không có SLA timing. Lambda copy tự build, không có SLA contractually. Batch Replication cho one-time/historical, không real-time.

questions.question: An EKS cluster runs stateless workloads with variable load. The team wants pods to scale based on application metrics (e.g., queue depth), and nodes to scale automatically as needed with cost optimization. Which combination should be used?

options.text: HPA with custom metrics from CloudWatch + Karpenter for node scaling
Manual node group scaling + CronJob to adjust replicas

questions.explanation: HPA scale pod theo custom metric (queue depth từ CloudWatch via CloudWatch metrics adapter). Karpenter chọn instance type tối ưu (mix spot/on-demand, instance family) — nhanh và efficient hơn Cluster Autoscaler. VPA điều chỉnh resource request từng pod, không scale replica.

questions.question: A team designs a multi-region active-passive architecture for an application using Aurora MySQL. The secondary region must be promotable within minutes if the primary fails. Which feature should be used?

options.text: Aurora Read Replica in another region
Aurora Global Database with secondary region

questions.explanation: Aurora Global Database: replicate sang region khác qua dedicated infra (RPO ~1s, RTO ~1 phút khi promote). Cross-region read replica truyền thống có lag cao hơn và promote chậm hơn. DMS không phải cho DR. Snapshot copy RPO ~1h, RTO hàng giờ.

questions.question: An application uses an SQS queue feeding Lambda. Sometimes Lambda fails to process messages due to transient errors. Messages should retry, and after 5 failed attempts, move to a separate queue for inspection. What configuration achieves this?

options.text: Set Lambda DLQ (legacy) on the function
Configure a Dead Letter Queue on the source SQS queue with maxReceiveCount of 5, plus a redrive policy

questions.explanation: SQS DLQ với maxReceiveCount=5 redrive sau 5 lần fail. Lambda DLQ (legacy) chỉ áp dụng async invoke, không cho source SQS. Visibility timeout 0 gây duplicate processing tức thì. EventBridge thay đổi architecture không cần thiết.

questions.question: A team operates an application across 3 Availability Zones using an ALB. One AZ becomes unhealthy. What is the expected behavior with default ALB cross-zone load balancing?

options.text: ALB stops sending traffic to the unhealthy AZ; remaining instances in healthy AZs receive distributed traffic
ALB sends 33% of traffic to each AZ regardless of health
ALB requires manual reconfiguration to exclude the failed AZ
ALB redirects all traffic to a single AZ

questions.explanation: ALB có cross-zone load balancing bật mặc định (free) — phân phối đều trên tất cả targets healthy bất kể AZ. Khi target ở 1 AZ unhealthy (qua health check), ALB tự loại khỏi pool. Không cần can thiệp thủ công. NLB mặc định OFF cross-zone (có tính phí inter-AZ).

questions.question: A DevOps team needs to centrally collect logs from 50 EC2 instances across multiple accounts into a single CloudWatch Logs destination for security analysis. What is the MOST efficient approach?

options.text: Install the CloudWatch agent on each instance and use a cross-account log destination + subscription filter
SSH into each instance daily and copy logs to S3
Use AWS Config to collect logs
Use AWS Backup to back up the logs directory

questions.explanation: CloudWatch agent stream logs lên CWL trong account local. Tạo destination (cross-account) trong security account, subscription filter trong account nguồn forward sang. Pattern centralized log management chuẩn. Các phương án khác không scale hoặc sai mục đích.

questions.question: An engineer wants to query CloudWatch Logs to find all API errors in the last hour, grouped by errorCode, sorted by count. Which tool is MOST appropriate?

options.text: CloudWatch Logs Insights with a stats query

questions.explanation: CloudWatch Logs Insights cung cấp query language SQL-like (filter, stats by, sort) trực tiếp trên log group, không cần export. Nhanh, native. Athena work nhưng cần export trước; Metrics Math là cho metric không phải log; X-Ray cho distributed trace.

questions.question: A team must monitor the availability of their public website from multiple geographic locations and be alerted if response time exceeds 2 seconds or status is non-200. Which AWS service provides this?
questions.explanation: CloudWatch Synthetics canary chạy script (Puppeteer/Selenium) định kỳ từ nhiều region, đo response time + status. Tích hợp CloudWatch alarm. RUM thu thập từ user thực, không proactive. X-Ray là tracing. Config kiểm tra cấu hình tài nguyên.

questions.question: An organization wants to ensure that all CloudTrail logs cannot be modified or deleted, even by root users with admin privileges, for compliance. What configuration achieves this?

options.text: Enable CloudTrail log file validation only
Use S3 Object Lock in Compliance mode on the CloudTrail bucket with a retention period

questions.explanation: S3 Object Lock Compliance mode: object không thể delete/overwrite kể cả root, trong khoảng thời gian retention. Đây là WORM (Write-Once-Read-Many) đáp ứng SEC 17a-4, FINRA. Log validation chỉ detect tampering. Versioning ngăn delete đơn lẻ nhưng admin có thể xóa version. KMS bảo mật nội dung không phải bất biến.

questions.question: A DevOps team operates 200 EC2 instances. They need to ensure all instances have a specific patch installed, and they need a continuous compliance report. Which combination of services is BEST?

options.text: AWS Config managed rule + Systems Manager Patch Manager + Patch Compliance dashboard
Manual SSH into each instance weekly

questions.explanation: Patch Manager (SSM) deploy patch theo baseline + maintenance window. AWS Config managed rule ec2-managedinstance-patch-compliance-status-check kiểm tra compliance, hiển thị trong Patch Compliance dashboard và Config dashboard. Inspector chỉ scan vulnerability không deploy patch.

questions.question: An application generates custom business metrics (e.g., 'orders_per_minute') that need to be visible in CloudWatch dashboards. What is the MOST efficient publish method from EC2?

options.text: Use the CloudWatch agent with metrics_collected configuration to publish custom metrics
Use PutMetricData API with embedded metric format (EMF) via CloudWatch Logs
Write metrics to S3, parse with Athena, and import to CloudWatch via Lambda
Email the metrics to AWS Support for ingestion

questions.explanation: Embedded Metric Format (EMF) là cách hiệu quả: app log structured JSON với metric definition, CloudWatch tự parse và tạo metric. Không cần gọi PutMetricData (rate limited, đồng bộ). CloudWatch agent cũng work nhưng cho system metric chính, EMF tốt hơn cho business metric custom.

questions.question: A team needs to track who made changes to security groups in their AWS account and be notified within 5 minutes of any change. Which architecture is BEST?

options.text: CloudTrail → EventBridge rule matching AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress/Egress → SNS topic
CloudWatch Logs subscription on VPC Flow Logs

questions.explanation: CloudTrail ghi mọi API call. EventBridge match event source aws.ec2 + eventName AuthorizeSecurityGroup* / RevokeSecurityGroup* → trigger SNS gần real-time (~minutes). Config snapshot quá chậm và không near-realtime. GuardDuty focus threat detection. VPC Flow Logs ghi traffic, không API change.

questions.question: A team uses VPC Flow Logs to analyze network traffic patterns and detect anomalies. Where is the MOST cost-effective place to store and query these logs for ad-hoc analysis?

options.text: S3 in Parquet format, queried via Amazon Athena

questions.explanation: VPC Flow Logs có thể export trực tiếp tới S3 với Hive partitioning và Parquet format → Athena query nhanh, rẻ (pay per scan). CloudWatch Logs đắt cho volume lớn của flow logs. DynamoDB/RDS không phù hợp với log analytics scale.

questions.question: A CloudWatch alarm is configured with 'Treat missing data as: missing'. Metric stops reporting data for an extended period. What state will the alarm be in?
questions.explanation: Với 'missing' treatment, alarm sẽ chuyển sang INSUFFICIENT_DATA khi không có data point. Các option khác: 'breaching' = ALARM, 'notBreaching' = OK, 'ignore' = giữ state cũ. Quan trọng cho việc detect khi agent/metric stop reporting.

questions.question: A multi-account organization needs centralized AWS Config compliance reporting across all accounts and regions. Which service should be used?

options.text: AWS Config aggregator with organization-wide source

questions.explanation: AWS Config aggregator collect Config data từ nhiều accounts + regions vào 1 dashboard. Với Organizations integration, tự động bao quát mọi member account. Security Hub cũng aggregate findings nhưng aggregator là feature chuyên cho Config. Trusted Advisor cho best practice riêng lẻ; SSM Inventory cho EC2 inventory.

questions.question: An application running on ECS Fargate logs to STDOUT. The team wants to send these logs to a centralized OpenSearch cluster for search and visualization. Which log driver configuration is correct?

options.text: Use awslogs driver and stream to CloudWatch Logs, then use a CloudWatch Logs subscription filter to a Lambda or Kinesis Data Firehose delivering to OpenSearch
Use the syslog driver pointing directly to OpenSearch
Mount an EFS volume on the container and write logs to a file
Use the json-file driver and SCP files to OpenSearch

questions.explanation: Fargate hỗ trợ awslogs (CloudWatch Logs) và awsfirelens (FluentBit). Pattern phổ biến: stream qua CWL → subscription filter → Kinesis Firehose → OpenSearch. Hoặc dùng awsfirelens với FluentBit output OpenSearch trực tiếp. Syslog/json-file driver không phù hợp Fargate.

questions.question: A company needs to automatically remediate non-compliant S3 buckets that have public read access. The remediation must run within minutes of detection. Which combination is MOST effective?

options.text: AWS Config rule s3-bucket-public-read-prohibited + SSM Automation document AWSConfigRemediation-RemoveS3BucketPublicAccess as remediation action
Daily Lambda function scanning all buckets

questions.explanation: AWS Config rule detect, kèm Remediation Action bằng SSM Automation document tự apply fix (apply Block Public Access). Native, gần real-time, audit-trail. Lambda hàng ngày quá chậm; Trusted Advisor không auto-remediate; GuardDuty email cần action thủ công.

questions.question: An EventBridge rule must trigger a Lambda function when an EC2 instance state changes to 'stopped' OR 'terminated'. Which event pattern is correct?
questions.explanation: EventBridge pattern dùng JSON array để match nhiều giá trị (OR). source 'aws.ec2', detail-type chính xác 'EC2 Instance State-change Notification'. Option D sai vì regex string không phải array. Option B chỉ match 1 state qua CloudTrail event name (lossy).

questions.question: A DevOps team needs to replay past events that triggered a Lambda function failure during a recent incident. Which EventBridge feature supports this?
questions.explanation: EventBridge Archive lưu events theo pattern (toàn bộ hoặc filtered). Replay phát lại events tới target trong cửa sổ thời gian — đúng để debug/recover post-incident. Schemas Registry cho event schema; Scheduler cho cron; Pipes cho stream integration source-to-target.

questions.question: An application uses Step Functions to orchestrate orders. One of the states calls an external API that occasionally returns 5xx. The workflow must retry with backoff, then catch error to a notification state. What configuration is needed on the Task state?

options.text: Add Retry with ErrorEquals: [States.TaskFailed] and BackoffRate; add Catch with ErrorEquals: [States.ALL] and Next: NotifyState
Only use Catch, retries are automatic
Use a Parallel state to retry
Use a Wait state followed by manual restart

questions.explanation: Task state hỗ trợ Retry (in-state retry với backoff) + Catch (transition sang state khác nếu retries exhausted). ErrorEquals: States.ALL bắt mọi error còn lại. Đây là native error handling, không cần Parallel/Wait workaround.

questions.question: A team wants to automatically open a ticket in their incident management system whenever a CloudWatch alarm enters ALARM state. Which architecture is MOST decoupled and scalable?

options.text: CloudWatch Alarm → SNS topic → Lambda (calling ticket API) with SQS DLQ
CloudWatch Alarm → direct webhook to the ticket system
CloudWatch Alarm → EC2 instance running a polling script

questions.explanation: SNS topic + Lambda subscriber với SQS DLQ cho retry/fault tolerance. Decoupled (nhiều subscriber có thể nghe), scalable (Lambda concurrency). Direct webhook không retry; EC2 polling không near-realtime; email cần thao tác thủ công.

questions.question: A DevOps team runs a CodePipeline that deploys to production. They want to be paged immediately if any pipeline execution fails. What is the MOST direct method?

options.text: EventBridge rule on source aws.codepipeline, detail-type 'CodePipeline Pipeline Execution State Change' with detail.state FAILED → SNS topic with on-call subscription
Use AWS Chatbot only without EventBridge
Configure CloudWatch metric filter on CodePipeline logs

questions.explanation: CodePipeline emit events tới EventBridge. Rule match state=FAILED + target SNS → PagerDuty/Opsgenie integration. Chatbot không thay thế trigger source. Metric filter trên logs phức tạp và lag; manual không scalable.

questions.question: An organization wants to detect when AWS credentials are exposed (e.g., in a public GitHub repo) and automatically rotate them. Which combination is MOST effective?

options.text: AWS automatically detects exposed access keys (via partner scanning), emits notification → EventBridge → Lambda calls IAM:DeleteAccessKey/CreateAccessKey + IAM:DetachUserPolicy as needed
Manually scan GitHub repos every day
Rely on GuardDuty CredentialAccess finding only

questions.explanation: AWS có quy trình tự detect khóa lộ qua hợp tác với GitHub/Bitbucket/etc. — tự apply quarantine policy (AWSCompromisedKeyQuarantine) + gửi support email + emit event. Pattern khuyến nghị: EventBridge rule trên 'AWS Health Event' / abuse notice → Lambda revoke key + tạo key mới + notify owner. GuardDuty CredentialAccess detect anomalous use không phải repo leak.

questions.question: A team runs scheduled jobs using EventBridge Scheduler. Some jobs are critical and must run exactly at the scheduled time across regions. What feature should be used?

options.text: Use EventBridge Scheduler with flexible time window of 0
Use EventBridge Scheduler with retry policy = 0 and exact schedule expression
Use Lambda with a CloudWatch Events legacy rule
Run a CRON job on an EC2 instance

questions.explanation: EventBridge Scheduler hỗ trợ cron, rate, one-time. Flexible time window cho phép spread invocation (giảm thundering herd) — nếu cần đúng giờ, set window=0 hoặc off và retry policy phù hợp. EC2 cron là anti-pattern (SPOF). CloudWatch Events legacy đang được replace bởi EventBridge Scheduler.

questions.question: An application logs application errors to CloudWatch Logs. The team wants to receive a notification when the error rate exceeds 10 errors per minute. What is the simplest approach?

options.text: Create a metric filter on the log group counting 'ERROR' occurrences, then a CloudWatch alarm on the resulting metric
Use a Lambda to scan logs every minute

questions.explanation: Metric filter parse pattern (vd: [ERROR]) trong log group, count → CloudWatch custom metric. Alarm threshold > 10 / 1 minute → SNS. Pattern native, không cần code. Lambda scan không scalable; X-Ray cho trace; Athena cho ad-hoc, không streaming alarm.

questions.question: A team uses AWS Systems Manager Automation to remediate issues. They want one runbook to be triggered automatically when an AWS Config rule reports non-compliant. How is this configured?

options.text: In the AWS Config rule, set a Remediation Action pointing to the SSM Automation document with parameters and optional Auto-remediation toggle
Hard-code the rule's evaluation Lambda to call SSM

questions.explanation: AWS Config Remediation Action native cho phép chỉ định SSM Automation document, map parameters từ resource non-compliant, optional auto-remediate (no manual approval). Đây là pattern khuyến nghị. Các option khác phức tạp/không native.

questions.question: An incident response process requires capturing a forensic snapshot of an EC2 instance's EBS volume and isolating the instance from network. Which automated approach uses native services?

options.text: Run an SSM Automation runbook that creates EBS snapshot, modifies security group to a 'quarantine' SG with no rules, detaches IAM role
Manually copy disk contents via SSH
Use AWS Backup with cross-region copy

questions.explanation: SSM Automation runbook orchestrate API calls: CreateSnapshot, ModifyInstanceAttribute (set quarantine SG), DisassociateIamInstanceProfile. Runbook có thể được trigger từ EventBridge (GuardDuty finding). Manual SSH chậm và phá vỡ evidence; AWS Backup không cho isolate; disable AZ ảnh hưởng workload khác.

questions.question: An organization uses AWS Organizations with multiple OUs. They need to prevent ALL accounts in a 'Sandbox' OU from creating resources in regions other than us-east-1 and us-west-2, regardless of IAM policies in member accounts. Which feature should be used?

options.text: IAM permission boundary on every user
Service Control Policy (SCP) attached to the Sandbox OU with aws:RequestedRegion condition

questions.explanation: SCP áp dụng guardrail toàn account/OU — không IAM nào trong member có thể vượt qua. Sử dụng condition aws:RequestedRegion NotIn [us-east-1, us-west-2] với Deny effect. Permission boundary chỉ cho IAM principal (không cover root); Config detect không enforce; resource policy không control resource creation.

questions.question: A microservice needs to retrieve a database password securely. The password must rotate automatically every 30 days. Which service is MOST appropriate?

options.text: AWS Secrets Manager with automatic rotation Lambda
SSM Parameter Store SecureString with manual rotation
Store password in a CloudFormation parameter with NoEcho
Encrypt password in S3 and read at runtime

questions.explanation: Secrets Manager có managed rotation: tích hợp native cho RDS/Aurora/DocumentDB/Redshift, hoặc Lambda custom rotation cho khác. Parameter Store SecureString không có auto rotation. CloudFormation NoEcho chỉ ẩn hiển thị, không rotate. S3 không có rotation.

questions.question: A DevOps team wants to detect Amazon S3 buckets containing sensitive data (PII, financial) across the organization. Which service is purpose-built for this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Macie sử dụng ML để discover, classify, protect sensitive data trong S3 (PII, PHI, secrets). GuardDuty cho threat detection (anomalous behavior, malicious IP). Inspector cho EC2/ECR vulnerability scan. Security Hub aggregate findings.

questions.question: An application running on EC2 needs to call S3 API. The team must avoid storing long-term credentials on the instance. What is the standard solution?

options.text: Store IAM user access keys in /etc/aws/credentials
Attach an IAM role to the EC2 instance via instance profile
Pass credentials via Lambda environment variables

questions.explanation: Instance profile + IAM role → SDK tự lấy temporary credentials qua IMDSv2 (token-based). Không có long-term credential stored. Đây là pattern bắt buộc của best practice. Store access key trên disk là anti-pattern. Lambda env không liên quan EC2. SSH key cho admin access, không cho API call.

questions.question: A company uses AWS Organizations. They want to set up a new account for a project with pre-configured guardrails, networking, and logging. Which service should they use?

options.text: Manually create account in Organizations console

questions.explanation: Control Tower Account Factory cung cấp account-vending workflow: tạo account mới qua Service Catalog product, áp dụng guardrails (SCP + Config), thiết lập VPC mặc định nếu cần, integrate centralized logging. Là cách chính thức để onboard account mới ở scale. Service Catalog đơn lẻ không có guardrail. Identity Center là SSO.

questions.question: Which AWS services help detect security threats and vulnerabilities? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: GuardDuty phát hiện threat từ CloudTrail/VPC Flow Logs/DNS Logs (anomaly detection ML). Inspector scan vulnerability cho EC2, ECR images, Lambda functions. Athena query S3 (analytics), Glue là ETL — không phải security tool.

questions.question: A developer needs to read a parameter from SSM Parameter Store from a Lambda function. The parameter is encrypted with a customer-managed KMS key. What permissions are required?

options.text: ssm:GetParameter AND kms:Decrypt on the customer-managed key

questions.explanation: Để đọc SecureString, principal cần ssm:GetParameter (đọc parameter) VÀ kms:Decrypt (giải mã value) trên KMS key đã dùng để encrypt. Nếu là AWS managed key (aws/ssm), không cần kms:Decrypt riêng (AWS quản lý). Wildcard ssm:*/kms:* vi phạm least privilege.

questions.question: An organization wants to centrally manage WAF rules across multiple accounts and ALBs/CloudFront distributions. Which service should they use?
questions.explanation: AWS Firewall Manager: central management cho WAF rule, Shield Advanced, Security Group, Network Firewall, DNS Firewall — trên nhiều account qua Organizations. Shield Advanced cho DDoS protection (per resource). Network Firewall là stateful firewall VPC. GuardDuty là threat detection.

questions.question: A team wants to restrict S3 bucket access to requests originating from a specific VPC endpoint. Which mechanism is correct?

options.text: S3 bucket policy with aws:SourceVpce condition
Security group on the S3 bucket
IAM user policy with VPC condition

questions.explanation: S3 bucket policy hỗ trợ condition aws:SourceVpce (VPC endpoint ID) hoặc aws:SourceVpc — chỉ allow request đi qua VPC endpoint cụ thể. S3 không có security group (chỉ EC2/ENI/RDS). Block Public Access là cho public, không phải VPC restriction.

questions.question: A compliance auditor needs read-only access to all AWS Config compliance reports across all accounts in the organization. Which approach is BEST?

options.text: Create IAM users in every account with AWSConfigUserAccess managed policy
Set up an AWS Config aggregator in a delegated administrator account + grant the auditor IAM role read access
Share CloudTrail logs with auditor via S3
Allow auditor root access to all accounts

questions.explanation: Config aggregator (delegated admin) tập trung dữ liệu compliance từ mọi account. Grant auditor role read-only trên aggregator. Single pane of glass. Tạo user trong mọi account không scale. Root access vi phạm bảo mật.

questions.question: An application uses IAM role A in account 111 to access an S3 bucket in account 222. The bucket policy allows account 111. Suddenly, calls fail with AccessDenied. The team finds that the role's IAM policy was tightened. What is required for cross-account access?

options.text: Only the IAM role's identity-based policy must allow s3:GetObject on the bucket
BOTH the IAM role's identity policy AND the bucket resource policy must allow the action
Only the bucket resource policy must allow the role
Use S3 ACLs instead of policies

questions.explanation: Cross-account access yêu cầu cả hai: principal's identity policy allow s3 action VÀ resource policy của bucket allow principal đó. Cả hai cùng tồn tại → access được. Cùng explicit Deny ở bất kỳ đâu → block. ACL là legacy, không khuyến nghị.

questions.question: A team wants to enforce that any IAM role created in member accounts cannot grant administrative privileges (e.g., iam:*, *:*). Which mechanism enforces this organization-wide?

options.text: IAM permission boundary attached to every IAM role at creation time, enforced via SCP requiring permission boundary on iam:CreateRole
AWS Config rule that detects after the fact
Send email to administrators when admin role is created

questions.explanation: Permission boundary là maximum permission cho IAM principal. SCP có thể require iam:CreateRole/CreateUser phải đi kèm condition iam:PermissionsBoundary = arn của boundary policy đã định. Boundary policy không cho iam:* hoặc *:* → mọi role mới đều bị hạn chế. Config rule detect sau khi tạo (không enforce). Các phương án khác chỉ alert.

questions.question: A company runs CodePipeline in Account A and deploys CloudFormation stacks to production Account B. Artifacts are stored in an S3 bucket in Account A encrypted with a customer-managed KMS key. What permissions configuration is required for the deployment action in Account B to succeed?

options.text: Make the S3 bucket public-read so Account B can download
Account B's CloudFormation role must have permissions on the S3 bucket and the KMS key; Account A's bucket policy and KMS key policy must allow Account B
Copy artifacts manually to a bucket in Account B before the deploy stage
Disable encryption on the artifact bucket

questions.explanation: Cross-account CodePipeline cần policy bidirectional: bucket policy + KMS key policy ở Account A cho phép Account B s3:GetObject + kms:Decrypt; IAM role ở Account B cho phép tương ứng. Đây là 4 policy cần align. Public-read và disable encryption là anti-pattern bảo mật.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer wants to enable CodeBuild to run multiple build configurations in parallel (e.g., Node.js 18, Node.js 20, multiple OS) from a single buildspec.yaml. Which feature should be used?

options.text: CodeBuild batch builds with build-matrix or build-list
Multiple CodePipeline pipelines, one per matrix
AWS Step Functions Parallel state invoking CodeBuild
Lambda functions invoking CodeBuild API in a loop

questions.explanation: CodeBuild batch builds hỗ trợ build-matrix (combination matrix) hoặc build-list (explicit list) trong buildspec, chạy song song và aggregate kết quả. Native, không cần orchestration bên ngoài. Step Functions/Lambda là overkill.

questions.question: A team wants to use GitHub Actions to deploy to AWS without storing long-term IAM access keys as GitHub secrets. Which authentication method is recommended?

options.text: Store IAM user access keys in GitHub Actions secrets and rotate weekly
Use AWS IAM OIDC identity provider with GitHub Actions OIDC tokens and a role with web identity trust
Use SSH key authentication to a bastion host
Embed credentials in the workflow file directly

questions.explanation: AWS IAM hỗ trợ OIDC provider cho GitHub Actions. GitHub issues short-lived OIDC token, AWS verify và issue STS credentials qua AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity. Không cần long-term key. Đây là pattern chuẩn hiện nay (2023+).

questions.question: An ECR repository stores hundreds of images. The team wants to automatically delete untagged images older than 14 days and keep only the latest 30 tagged images. Which feature should be used?

options.text: ECR lifecycle policy with multiple rules sorted by priority
S3 lifecycle policy on the ECR backing bucket

questions.explanation: ECR lifecycle policies cho phép định nghĩa multiple rules với priority. Rule 1: tagStatus=UNTAGGED, sinceImagePushed=14 days; Rule 2: tagStatus=TAGGED, countType=imageCountMoreThan, countNumber=30. ECR tự động dọn dẹp. Native, free, không cần Lambda.

questions.question: A Lambda function is deployed via SAM. The team wants the deployment to run a validation Lambda BEFORE shifting any traffic, AND a smoke test Lambda AFTER full traffic shift completes. Which AppSpec hooks should be configured?

options.text: BeforeAllowTraffic for validation, AfterAllowTraffic for smoke test
ApplicationStart for validation, ValidateService for smoke test
Install for validation, ApplicationStop for smoke test

questions.explanation: Cho Lambda deployment, AppSpec có 2 hooks: BeforeAllowTraffic (chạy trước khi shift, nếu fail → cancel deployment) và AfterAllowTraffic (chạy sau khi shift hoàn tất, nếu fail → trigger rollback). Các hook khác (ApplicationStart, ValidateService) là cho EC2.

questions.question: A CodeBuild project's buildspec runs unit tests and generates a JUnit XML report. The team wants this report visible in the CodeBuild console with test result trends. How is this configured?

options.text: Use the reports section in buildspec.yaml with a report group of type TEST
Manually upload the XML to S3 after each build

questions.explanation: CodeBuild Reports support test reports (JUnit, TestNG, Cucumber, etc.) và code coverage reports (JaCoCo, Clover, Cobertura, SimpleCov). Khai báo trong buildspec.yaml.reports với file-format và files. Console hiển thị pass rate, duration, trends qua time.

questions.question: A company uses CodePipeline V2 with multiple sources. They want to trigger a pipeline only when changes are pushed to specific file paths (e.g., src/**). Which feature supports this?

options.text: Pipeline trigger filters with file paths (Git push trigger)
S3 event notification with prefix filter
Pipeline cannot filter by file path

questions.explanation: CodePipeline V2 introduce trigger filters: theo branch, tag, file path patterns. Khi push không match filter, pipeline không trigger. Đáp ứng pattern monorepo (chỉ chạy pipeline khi thư mục liên quan thay đổi).

questions.question: Which AWS CodeDeploy deployment types are supported for AWS Lambda functions? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Lambda hỗ trợ Canary (shift X% rồi đợi N phút rồi 100%) và Linear (shift đều theo X% mỗi N phút) và AllAtOnce. Rolling/in-place là cho EC2. Blue/Green với in-place là contradiction.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer notices that CodeBuild jobs are slow because npm install downloads packages from scratch every time. Which feature speeds up subsequent builds?

options.text: CodeBuild cache mode: S3 cache or local DOCKER_LAYER/CUSTOM cache
Pre-install all packages on the AMI

questions.explanation: CodeBuild cache: S3 cache (artifacts cached across builds) hoặc local cache (DOCKER_LAYER, SOURCE, CUSTOM) trong cùng host khi available. Khai báo trong project config + cache paths trong buildspec. Significant speedup cho dependency reinstall.

questions.question: A team uses Elastic Beanstalk and wants to deploy a long-running background processing application that consumes from an SQS queue. Which environment tier should be selected?

options.text: Both Web Server and Worker tier

questions.explanation: Beanstalk Worker tier có SQS daemon đọc message từ queue và POST tới ứng dụng tại localhost. Phù hợp cho background processing dài. Web Server tier dành cho HTTP request/response. Worker tier không có public endpoint.

questions.question: A team manages multiple production accounts and wants to centralize CI/CD: one pipeline that deploys to dev/staging/prod accounts. Which authorization pattern is correct?

options.text: Pipeline assumes a CrossAccountDeploymentRole in each target account; trust policy in target accounts allows the pipeline account
Pipeline uses root credentials of each target account
Replicate the pipeline to each account
Use AWS Backup to push artifacts

questions.explanation: Cross-account deployment pattern: pipeline trong shared services account, assume role trong dev/staging/prod để deploy. Role trong target accounts trust pipeline account, có inline permissions tương ứng. Root credentials nghiêm cấm theo best practice.

questions.question: A developer needs to deploy an updated CloudFormation template that includes IAM role creation. The deploy fails with: 'Requires capabilities: [CAPABILITY_IAM]'. What is the correct action?

options.text: Acknowledge IAM resource creation by passing CAPABILITY_IAM (or CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM if naming custom roles) during stack update
Remove IAM resources from the template
Run the template as root user

questions.explanation: CloudFormation yêu cầu user acknowledge khi template tạo/sửa IAM. CAPABILITY_IAM cho generic IAM resources; CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM khi có custom name (Name property). Đây là safety check tránh accidentally tạo privileged identities.

questions.question: An AWS CodeArtifact repository serves Maven dependencies. The team wants to ensure that if a dependency is downloaded from upstream Maven Central, the same version is retained in CodeArtifact even after future upstream changes/removals. Which feature provides this?

options.text: Package retention: once ingested from upstream, the package is stored in CodeArtifact
Schedule a Lambda to back up to S3

questions.explanation: CodeArtifact tự retain package đã ingested. Khi developer pull artifact từ external (Maven Central/PyPI/npm), CodeArtifact lưu copy nội bộ. Subsequent pulls dùng cached copy, không phụ thuộc upstream availability. Phòng tránh leftpad scenario.

questions.question: A team uses Amplify Hosting for a Next.js frontend application. They want preview deployments for every pull request automatically. What needs to be configured?

options.text: Enable pull request previews in Amplify Hosting branch settings
Manually run amplify push for each PR
Run a Lambda to detect PRs

questions.explanation: AWS Amplify Hosting có 'Pull request previews' feature: với mỗi PR mở, tự tạo preview deployment với unique URL, tự destroy khi PR đóng. Khai báo qua branch settings hoặc amplify.yml. Native, zero-config infra.

questions.question: A DevOps team uses CodePipeline to deploy a CloudFormation stack with custom Lambda Layer dependencies. The Lambda code is in source, but the layer takes 5 minutes to build. They want to skip rebuild if dependencies haven't changed. Which CodeBuild feature helps?

options.text: Source cache + custom cache paths in buildspec

questions.explanation: CodeBuild custom cache paths trong buildspec.yaml.cache.paths cho phép list directory để cache giữa builds (vd: /root/.m2/**, node_modules/**). Combine với S3 cache mode → đáng kể giảm thời gian build cho dependency caching.

questions.question: An organization wants to enforce that ALL CodeBuild projects have logs encrypted with a customer-managed KMS key. Which mechanism enforces this at scale across many accounts?

options.text: AWS Config managed rule + automated remediation via SSM Automation

questions.explanation: AWS Config rule (vd: codebuild-project-envvar-awscred-check, or custom Lambda rule kiểm tra encryptionDisabled) detect non-compliant. Pair với SSM Automation document remediation → tự enable encryption. Pattern chuẩn cho compliance enforcement at scale.

questions.question: A team needs to invalidate CloudFront cache after each deployment of static assets to S3. What is the MOST automated approach?

options.text: Add a CodeBuild post_build phase that calls aws cloudfront create-invalidation with --paths '/*'
Wait for natural cache expiration (24 hours)

questions.explanation: Pattern phổ biến: sau khi sync S3, gọi cloudfront create-invalidation. Có thể dùng cloudfront-invalidation action trong CodePipeline (custom action) hoặc đơn giản aws CLI trong CodeBuild. Wait 24h là disruptive cho user.

questions.question: A team uses CodeDeploy with an Auto Scaling Group. After a successful deployment, new EC2 instances launched by the ASG do NOT have the latest application code. What is the likely cause?

options.text: ASG launch template/configuration uses an outdated AMI; CodeDeploy needs to be configured to deploy on launch

questions.explanation: CodeDeploy deploys lên instances EXISTING tại thời điểm deploy. New instances launched bởi ASG sau đó dùng AMI cũ. Solution: enable 'AutoScalingHook' (CodeDeploy lifecycle hook trong ASG) — CodeDeploy tự deploy latest revision khi instance mới launch. Hoặc bake AMI mới sau mỗi deploy.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer wants to schedule a CodePipeline execution to run at 2 AM UTC daily (e.g., for nightly tests). What is the BEST way?

options.text: Create an EventBridge scheduled rule (cron) targeting the pipeline
Manual trigger by an engineer at 2 AM
CodePipeline has built-in scheduler with cron syntax

questions.explanation: EventBridge scheduled rule với cron expression target CodePipeline (action: codepipeline:StartPipelineExecution). Pattern chuẩn. CodePipeline V2 cũng có schedule trigger native nhưng EventBridge phổ biến hơn cho cross-service orchestration.

questions.question: A CodeDeploy in-place EC2 deployment is failing in the BeforeInstall hook because the user data script doesn't have permissions to download from a private S3 bucket. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Attach an IAM role to the EC2 instance with s3:GetObject permission on the bucket
Hard-code AWS access keys in the script

questions.explanation: EC2 instance profile + IAM role là pattern chuẩn để cấp S3 access. CodeDeploy agent dùng credentials từ instance metadata. Hard-code keys vi phạm best practice. Public bucket nguy hiểm.

questions.question: A team uses CodeCommit and wants to enforce that all commits to the 'main' branch have a Jira ticket ID in the commit message. Which feature enforces this?

options.text: CodeCommit pre-commit hook is not supported; use a Lambda triggered by CodeCommit pullRequestStatusChanged event to validate the PR title/commits

questions.explanation: CodeCommit không có server-side pre-receive hooks. Pattern khuyến nghị: CodeCommit phát events qua EventBridge (referenceUpdated, pullRequestCreated, pullRequestStatusChanged). Lambda subscribe, validate commit message/PR meta, post comment hoặc block merge qua API.

questions.question: An application running on Lambda has a deployment that uses an alias 'live' with weighted routing: version 5 = 90%, version 6 = 10%. The team wants to programmatically check if v6's error rate exceeds 1% and roll back. Which AWS service ORCHESTRATES this automatically?

options.text: CodeDeploy + CloudWatch alarm linked to deployment group; CodeDeploy automatically rolls back if alarm fires during the deployment window

questions.explanation: CodeDeploy deployment group có 'alarms' setting: nếu CloudWatch alarm enter ALARM trong cửa sổ deployment, CodeDeploy tự rollback (shift 100% về version cũ). Đây là native canary safety pattern cho Lambda + ECS.

questions.question: A monorepo has 5 microservices. The team wants only the changed service's pipeline to run on each commit. What is the MOST native AWS approach?

options.text: 5 separate CodePipelines, each with CodePipeline V2 trigger filters limited to that service's path (e.g., services/svc1/**)
One pipeline that builds all services every time
Use Lambda to detect changes and trigger pipelines

questions.explanation: CodePipeline V2 trigger filters hỗ trợ file path patterns. Mỗi service có pipeline riêng với filter ('services/svc1/**'). Khi push, chỉ pipeline tương ứng trigger. Native, không cần code orchestration. Pattern monorepo phổ biến.

questions.question: A CodePipeline includes a CodeBuild action that needs to access secrets stored in AWS Secrets Manager. What is the recommended way?

options.text: Reference secrets in buildspec env.secrets-manager section; CodeBuild fetches them at runtime via the project's service role with secretsmanager:GetSecretValue permission

questions.explanation: Buildspec env.secrets-manager: { ENV_NAME: 'secret-name:json-key' } — CodeBuild tự resolve và expose as environment variable. Service role cần secretsmanager:GetSecretValue + kms:Decrypt. Tương tự env.parameter-store cho SSM. Native, không expose secret trong logs.

questions.question: A team needs to publish CodeBuild build status (PASSED/FAILED) back to GitHub as a commit status check. What is required?

options.text: Configure 'Report build status' in CodeBuild source settings when source is GitHub; CodeBuild uses the GitHub PAT/OAuth connection to post status
Write a Lambda function to call GitHub API

questions.explanation: CodeBuild project source config 'Report build status to source provider' (cho GitHub/GitHub Enterprise/Bitbucket) — CodeBuild tự gọi API tạo commit status. Required: source provider connection có scope phù hợp (status:write). Lambda là workaround không cần thiết.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer creates an Elastic Beanstalk environment but needs to customize the underlying EC2 (install agent, configure firewall rules). What mechanism allows this without rebuilding the AMI?

options.text: .ebextensions config files in the source bundle (.config YAML/JSON for packages, commands, files, services)

questions.explanation: .ebextensions thư mục chứa .config file YAML khai báo packages, files, commands, container_commands, services. Beanstalk apply trong deployment workflow. Mạnh mẽ và versioned cùng source. AMI customization (Saved Configuration / Platform Hook) là alternative cho complex case.

questions.question: A team uses CodePipeline for ECS deployments. They want a manual approval BETWEEN the build stage and the deploy stage, with a Slack notification when approval is needed. Best approach?

options.text: Manual Approval action + SNS topic in approval action; AWS Chatbot subscribed to SNS posts to Slack channel
Lambda function polling pipeline status every 5 minutes and emailing the team

questions.explanation: Manual Approval action có optional 'SNS topic' field: khi action waiting, gửi message tới SNS. AWS Chatbot subscribe SNS, forward to Slack/MS Teams với clickable approve/reject. Lambda polling là anti-pattern.

questions.question: An ECS Blue/Green deployment via CodeDeploy is configured with deployment config CodeDeployDefault.ECSAllAtOnce. The team realized 30 seconds after switch that the new version is broken. What is the FASTEST rollback?

options.text: Stop the deployment in CodeDeploy console; CodeDeploy reverts traffic to the previous task set immediately
Manually delete the new ECS task set via aws ecs delete-task-set
Update the ECS service to revert task definition

questions.explanation: CodeDeploy ECS Blue/Green giữ 2 task sets song song trong deployment window (default 1 hour). 'Stop and roll back deployment' trong console gửi traffic ngay về task set cũ + xóa task set mới. Tốc độ chỉ giây.

questions.question: A team builds a Docker image in CodeBuild and pushes to ECR. They want to sign images and have only signed images allowed to deploy via Amazon EKS. Which service supports image signing?

options.text: AWS Signer with Notation (OCI signature) + EKS admission controller validating signatures

questions.explanation: AWS Signer (AWS-managed signing service) hỗ trợ container image signing với Notation (CNCF standard). EKS admission controller (vd: Sigstore policy-controller hoặc Kyverno) verify signature trước khi pull. Đây là supply-chain security pattern cho EKS.

questions.question: A CodePipeline includes deployment to multiple regions. The team wants each region's deploy to wait for the previous region's deploy to succeed (sequential, not parallel). How is this configured?

options.text: Place each region's deployment as a separate stage; stages execute sequentially by default
Use multiple pipelines and chain them with EventBridge
Set runOrder to the same value on each action
Pipelines cannot enforce sequential regional deploys

questions.explanation: CodePipeline stages chạy tuần tự. Mỗi region deploy là 1 stage → tự sequential. Trong cùng 1 stage, actions với runOrder khác nhau cũng sequential, cùng runOrder thì parallel. Vậy chia stages là đơn giản nhất cho regional progression.

questions.question: An organization wants every CodeCommit push to trigger SonarQube static analysis BEFORE allowing merge to main. SonarQube runs on EC2. What is the cleanest integration?

options.text: CodeCommit pullRequestCreated event → EventBridge → Lambda invokes CodeBuild project that runs sonar-scanner and posts comment to PR via CodeCommit API
Use AWS Inspector instead of SonarQube

questions.explanation: Event-driven pattern: CodeCommit pullRequest events → EventBridge → Lambda/CodeBuild → run SAST → post PR comment (PostCommentForPullRequest API). Tích hợp với Approval Rules có thể block merge nếu scan fail. Pattern chuẩn cho shift-left security.

questions.question: Which actions can a CodePipeline pipeline take in response to a stage failure? (Select TWO)

options.text: Automatically roll back to the most recent successful execution (if Stage rollback is enabled, V2)
Retry the failed stage manually or automatically via configuration
Page on-call via Slack with no other action

questions.explanation: CodePipeline V2 hỗ trợ Stage Rollback: tự rollback về execution thành công gần nhất khi stage fail. Retry stage: thủ công qua console/API hoặc tự động retry (configurable). Auto delete pipeline không phải feature.

questions.question: A team uses AWS CDK Pipelines (Pipelines construct from aws-cdk-lib). What is the BIGGEST benefit of using CDK Pipelines over hand-coded CodePipeline?

options.text: Self-mutating pipeline: changes to the pipeline definition (in CDK code) are automatically applied to the pipeline itself on the next run

questions.explanation: CDK Pipelines self-mutate: pipeline đầu tiên build chính nó, sau đó deploy app stages. Nếu CDK code update pipeline (thêm stage, action), commit tiếp theo sẽ apply self-update trước khi tiếp tục. Eliminate manual pipeline updates.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer needs to roll back a Beanstalk environment to a previous application version. What is the FASTEST way?

options.text: In Beanstalk console, deploy a previous application version from the version history
Re-upload the old code as a new version

questions.explanation: Beanstalk lưu application versions (default 1000 versions, configurable lifecycle policy). Console → Application versions → chọn version cũ → Deploy to environment. Nhanh và rollback granular. Không cần snapshot/recreate.

questions.question: A company wants to validate that all CloudFormation stacks deployed to production accounts include specific tags (CostCenter, Owner) BEFORE the stack is created. Which feature provides pre-provisioning validation?

options.text: CloudFormation Hooks (pre-provisioning) with a Lambda or AWS-managed hook checking required tags

questions.explanation: CloudFormation Hooks chạy pre-provisioning (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE), inspect resource properties trước khi apply. Custom hook hoặc AWS-managed (vd: AWSSamples::TagValidation). Có thể fail stack creation nếu vi phạm. AWS Config rule là post-creation (detect sau khi đã tạo).

questions.question: A platform team manages 30 microservice teams. They want to provide reusable, opinionated CloudFormation components (e.g., 'StandardVPC', 'EncryptedRDS') that teams can import via simple syntax. Which feature is BEST?

options.text: CloudFormation Modules registered in CloudFormation Registry

questions.explanation: CloudFormation Modules (CFN Registry) đóng gói nhiều resources thành 1 'logical resource' tái sử dụng. Teams reference Type: MyCompany::Network::VPC::MODULE. Versioned, governed. Service Catalog là cho self-service launching (khác level). Macros là template transformer thấp hơn.

questions.question: A SAM project deploys a Lambda function with native binary dependencies (e.g., NumPy on Linux). On macOS dev machine, sam build produces incompatible artifacts. How to fix?

options.text: Use sam build --use-container, which builds inside a Docker container matching Lambda runtime

questions.explanation: sam build --use-container chạy build trong Docker image phù hợp với Lambda runtime (vd: public.ecr.aws/sam/build-python3.11). Đảm bảo native binaries (NumPy, Pillow, cryptography) compile cho Amazon Linux 2/2023. Bypass platform mismatch.

questions.question: A team uses AWS CDK and wants to enforce that all S3 buckets created across their CDK app have encryption enabled. How is this achieved cleanly?

options.text: Use a CDK Aspect that visits every node in the construct tree and validates/annotates S3 buckets, throwing error if encryption is missing

questions.explanation: CDK Aspects implement IAspect, visit construct tree, can validate/modify nodes (vd: throw error if S3Bucket missing encryption, hoặc auto-set encryption = AES256). Chạy at synth time. Pattern enforcement-in-code, shift-left.

questions.question: A Step Functions workflow processes a list of 10 million orders. Each item invokes a Lambda. The standard Map state has limitations on item count. Which feature handles this scale?

options.text: Distributed Map state (introduced in 2022) processes large datasets from S3, can scale to millions of items with high parallelism
Step Functions doesn't support this; use Lambda directly

questions.explanation: Distributed Map state đọc input từ S3 objects/array, process tới 10K parallel, 1M+ items. Khác inline Map (limited inline, 40 concurrent). Phù hợp ETL, batch processing scale. Có ItemBatcher, ToleratedFailureCount để fault tolerance.

questions.question: An organization manages 100s of SSM Parameters. They want hierarchical organization (/app/env/version) and the ability to retrieve all parameters under a prefix with a single API call. Which Parameter Store feature?

options.text: Hierarchical parameter names with GetParametersByPath API
Use environment variables on EC2 only

questions.explanation: Parameter Store names có thể hierarchical (slash-separated, vd: /myapp/prod/db/host). GetParametersByPath với Path=/myapp/prod/ trả về tất cả params dưới prefix. Recursive flag để deep. Pattern config management chuẩn cho multi-env apps.

questions.question: A team uses AppConfig for feature flags. They deploy a flag change with strategy AppConfig.Linear50PercentEvery30Seconds. CloudWatch alarm 'HighErrorRate' enters ALARM state during deployment. What happens?

options.text: If the deployment has the alarm configured as a monitor, AppConfig automatically rolls back the configuration

questions.explanation: AppConfig Deployment có optional 'monitor' alarms. Khi any alarm fire trong deployment window, AppConfig auto-rollback (revert config). Đây là 'safe deployment' pattern cho dynamic config tương tự CodeDeploy alarm rollback.

questions.question: A team wants to ensure that all EC2 instances in their account have a specific CloudWatch agent configuration. They need the configuration to be applied at launch AND continuously enforced (drift remediation). Which SSM feature?

options.text: SSM State Manager Association targeting EC2 by tag, running an SSM Document on a schedule
Lambda triggered by EC2 launch events

questions.explanation: SSM State Manager Association apply Document tới instances theo tag/instance IDs trên schedule (vd: rate(30 minutes)). Reapply liên tục → drift correction. User Data chỉ chạy 1 lần. Config chỉ detect không enforce.

questions.question: A CloudFormation StackSet deploys a stack to 50 accounts. The team wants to roll out updates progressively: 5 accounts first, monitor for 1 hour, then continue. Which feature supports this?

options.text: Deployment targets with operation preferences (MaxConcurrentCount, FailureToleranceCount) + Stack deployment Hooks (CloudWatch alarm in account)

questions.explanation: StackSet operation preferences: MaxConcurrentCount=5 (chỉ 5 account cùng lúc), FailureToleranceCount=0 (stop nếu fail). Combine với CloudWatch alarms hoặc post-deploy validation Lambda để monitor giữa các batch. Native progressive rollout.

questions.question: Which Step Functions state types support catching errors? (Select TWO)
questions.explanation: Task và Parallel states hỗ trợ Retry/Catch fields. Map state cũng có. Wait/Pass/Choice/Succeed/Fail không thực thi code nên không có error model. Retry chạy in-place, Catch transition tới state khác.

questions.question: A team uses Service Catalog to provision standardized EC2 environments. They want developers (without IAM permissions to create EC2) to launch products via Service Catalog, but only with approved instance types. Which constraint type?

options.text: Launch constraint (specify role) + Template constraint (limit parameter values like InstanceType to allowed list)
Service Catalog doesn't enforce parameter values

questions.explanation: Launch constraint: Service Catalog assume role để launch product → user không cần direct EC2 permission. Template constraint: JSON rule giới hạn parameter values (vd: InstanceType must be in ['t3.micro', 't3.small']). Combine = guardrailed self-service.

questions.question: A SAM template uses Globals section to define Lambda runtime once for all functions. A specific function needs Python 3.12 while Globals declare Python 3.11. How does SAM resolve this?

options.text: Function-level property OVERRIDES Globals; the specific function uses Python 3.12 while others inherit 3.11

questions.explanation: SAM Globals là default cho tất cả resources cùng type. Function-level property override. Predictable behavior. Tương tự CloudFormation default vs explicit. Globals giảm boilerplate, override khi cần.

questions.question: An organization migrating from OpsWorks Stacks (deprecated May 26, 2024) needs an alternative for configuration management with Chef cookbooks. Which option requires LEAST refactoring?

options.text: AWS Systems Manager + custom SSM documents to install Chef Solo and run cookbooks; or migrate to a managed Chef SaaS like Chef Automate
Rewrite all cookbooks as CloudFormation templates
EC2 user-data with bash scripts only

questions.explanation: OpsWorks Stacks EOL 2024-05-26. AWS đề xuất: (1) Systems Manager + SSM Document chạy Chef Solo/Zero (giữ lại cookbooks), hoặc (2) Chef Automate self-hosted hoặc (3) refactor sang IaC. OpsWorks for Chef Automate cũng đã EOL May 2024. SSM path = ít refactor nhất.

questions.question: A team uses CloudFormation Transform Macros (AWS::Include, custom macros). The deployment fails with 'CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND required'. What does this capability acknowledge?

options.text: It acknowledges that the template uses macros that may transform the template at deploy time (could add resources not visible upfront)

questions.explanation: CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND đảm bảo user nhận thức rằng template macro/SAM Transform/Include sẽ mở rộng template tại deploy time, có thể tạo resources không hiện rõ trong source template. Safety check tránh blind deploy.
