questions.question: A team uses AWS Proton to define standardized service templates (e.g., 'WebServiceWithRDS'). What is the PRIMARY benefit of Proton over Service Catalog for platform engineering?

options.text: Proton manages full lifecycle: provisioning + ongoing maintenance/upgrades; environment vs service template separation
Proton is cheaper than Service Catalog
Proton is for end users, not platform teams

questions.explanation: AWS Proton = platform engineering tool: separate environment (network, DBs) và service templates (app code). Platform team định nghĩa, dev team self-serve. Khác Service Catalog: Proton manage update propagation cross instances of same template. Service Catalog = catalog cho one-time launches.

questions.question: A CloudFormation stack has a resource AWS::RDS::DBInstance. The team wants to delete the stack but keep the database for data retention. How is this configured?

options.text: Add DeletionPolicy: Retain (or Snapshot) to the DBInstance resource
Manually export the DB before deletion

questions.explanation: DeletionPolicy = Retain (giữ resource, hủy reference) hoặc Snapshot (tạo final snapshot trước khi xóa - dành cho RDS, EBS, ElastiCache). Default = Delete (xóa resource khi stack delete). UpdateReplacePolicy là cho update gây replacement (similar concept).

questions.question: A team uses CDK to deploy stacks to multiple environments (dev, staging, prod). They want different config per environment without copy-paste of stack code. What pattern is recommended?

options.text: Use CDK context (cdk.json) or environment-specific Stage with props passed to a single Stack class
Maintain separate CDK apps per environment

questions.explanation: CDK Stages: group of stacks deployed together cho 1 env. Pass props ({ envName, dbInstanceClass }) tới Stack class. Hoặc cdk.json context để config khác nhau. Single source of truth + parameterized. Anti-pattern: copy CDK app cho mỗi env.

questions.question: A platform team distributes AWS configurations via Systems Manager Parameter Store. They notice that frequent reads from Lambda are increasing costs and adding latency. What optimization helps?

options.text: Use the Parameters and Secrets Lambda Extension to cache parameters/secrets in memory across invocations
Read parameters at deployment time and embed as env vars

questions.explanation: AWS Lambda Extension 'Parameters and Secrets Lambda Extension' (Layer) cache values in-memory với configurable TTL. Lambda code gọi localhost HTTP thay vì SSM/Secrets Manager API. Giảm latency + API call cost đáng kể.

questions.question: A CloudFormation template creates an S3 bucket with a randomly-generated name and an SNS topic that needs to know the bucket name. How is this dependency expressed?

options.text: Use Ref or Fn::GetAtt on the bucket resource in the SNS topic's properties; CloudFormation handles ordering automatically
Manually set the bucket name first

questions.explanation: CloudFormation tự tính dependency graph từ Ref/Fn::GetAtt/Fn::Sub references — order resources accordingly. DependsOn dùng khi không có data dependency nhưng cần explicit ordering. Pattern chuẩn là Ref.

questions.question: A CloudFormation stack update fails midway. The team wants to know exactly which resource failed and why WITHOUT digging through Events. Which feature provides this?

options.text: Stack Events filtered by ResourceStatus CREATE_FAILED/UPDATE_FAILED, plus ResourceStatusReason

questions.explanation: Stack Events show timeline với ResourceStatusReason cho FAILED events — rất verbose (vd: 'API rate limit exceeded', 'Property X must match pattern Y'). Filter trong console hoặc DescribeStackEvents CLI. Đây là first stop debug stack failure.

questions.question: A team uses Systems Manager Automation runbooks for routine operations. They want to enforce that runbook executions require an approval step. Which feature?

options.text: Use 'aws:approve' action inside the SSM Automation document with approver IAM principals
Wrap runbook in Step Functions with Manual Approval
Run only via console with confirmation

questions.explanation: SSM Automation document hỗ trợ action 'aws:approve' — pause execution và yêu cầu approvers IAM principal approve qua console/CLI. Native, không cần Step Functions wrapper. Useful cho destructive operations runbook.

questions.question: A team wants their CDK app to fail synth if any IAM policy in the generated CloudFormation contains 'Action: \"*\"' or 'Resource: \"*\"' (overly broad). What CDK feature enables this?

options.text: CDK Aspects implementing IAspect that inspect IAM policy statements and call Annotations.of(node).addError() on violations

questions.explanation: CDK Aspects + Annotations.addError() fail synth khi vi phạm policy. Visit construct tree, inspect Policy statements, validate. Shift-left security: catch trước khi deploy. AWS Config / SCP detect/enforce sau khi tạo (defense in depth).

questions.question: A SAM application has a Lambda function and an API Gateway. The team wants local testing of the full API with hot-reload of code changes. Which command?
questions.explanation: sam local start-api emulate API Gateway + Lambda local. --warm-containers EAGER giữ container alive cho fast iteration. Combine với hot-reload (file watcher) hoặc CLI option per runtime. Best dev loop cho serverless local.

questions.question: A CloudFormation stack creates an EC2 instance with UserData that installs software. The team wants the stack to NOT report CREATE_COMPLETE until the software is actually installed (not just instance running). Which mechanism?

options.text: CreationPolicy with ResourceSignal: count=1, Timeout=PT15M; UserData calls cfn-signal --exit-code 0 after install succeeds

questions.explanation: CreationPolicy ResourceSignal pause CFN tới khi nhận N signals từ instance (cfn-signal helper script trong UserData). Timeout safety. Đảm bảo bootstrap hoàn tất trước khi mark CREATE_COMPLETE. Modern alternative to WaitCondition.

questions.question: A team uses Terraform to manage AWS infrastructure but wants AWS-native drift detection alongside Terraform state. Which AWS service helps?

options.text: AWS Config (detect resource configuration changes outside of Terraform), combined with Terraform state-based detection (terraform plan)
CloudFormation drift detection (only works for CFN stacks)

questions.explanation: AWS Config track configuration history bất kể IaC tool. Setup recorder + delivery channel + rules để detect drift. Terraform plan detect difference giữa state file và actual. 2 tầng: Config = AWS-side, terraform plan = Terraform-side.

questions.question: A CloudFormation StackSet update is partially failing — 3 of 30 accounts fail because of regional service limit. The team wants the operation to NOT abort but continue with the other accounts. Which preference handles this?

options.text: Set FailureToleranceCount higher (e.g., 3 or use FailureTolerancePercentage)

questions.explanation: FailureToleranceCount/Percentage: số/% account fail trước khi stop operation. Đặt 3 (hoặc cao hơn) để cho phép 3 fail mà vẫn tiếp tục với account khác. MaxConcurrentCount là throughput, không liên quan tolerance.

questions.question: A mission-critical application uses Route 53 for DNS. During a regional outage, automatic DNS failover via health checks is too slow because TTL is 60 seconds and DNS caching. The team needs sub-30-second failover guarantee. Which Route 53 feature provides this?

options.text: Route 53 Application Recovery Controller (ARC) with routing controls — instant, deterministic traffic shifting independent of DNS TTL

questions.explanation: Route 53 ARC routing controls thực hiện shift theo data plane riêng biệt (không phụ thuộc DNS TTL). On/Off switch determinate, propagation gần như tức thì. Phù hợp cho enterprise critical với strict RTO. TTL=1 vẫn bị resolver caching unpredictable.

questions.question: An organization runs DR drills quarterly. They want a Route 53 ARC feature to verify that the secondary region is READY to take traffic (resources scaled, configs sync). Which feature?

options.text: Readiness Checks in Route 53 ARC: define resource sets in both regions, ARC continuously audits parity (capacity, configs)

questions.explanation: ARC Readiness Checks: define cell (set of resources per region), check resource type parity và quota. Reports differences (vd: standby region thiếu Lambda concurrency). Surface trouble TRƯỚC khi failover thật.

questions.question: An ALB serves a stateful web application requiring session affinity. Sessions should last 24 hours for each user. Which sticky session type?

options.text: Duration-based sticky sessions on the ALB target group with cookie expiration = 86400 seconds

questions.explanation: ALB hỗ trợ 2 loại stickiness: Duration-based (cookie AWSALB) và Application-based (cookie tùy app, ALB pass through). Duration phù hợp cho HTTP, expiration configurable. App-based khi muốn app control session.

questions.question: An Aurora Global Database has us-east-1 as primary and eu-west-1 as secondary. The team wants applications in eu-west-1 to write locally (low latency) without manual failover. Which feature?

options.text: Aurora Global Database write forwarding from secondary region: writes are forwarded to primary, reads stay local

questions.explanation: Aurora Global Database write forwarding (cho MySQL-compatible & PostgreSQL-compatible): app trong secondary region gửi write tới local endpoint, Aurora tự forward về primary, read consistency configurable. Single-master design giữ nguyên.

questions.question: A DynamoDB table experiences hot partition spikes. Reads on a specific PK return ProvisionedThroughputExceededException intermittently. Provisioned mode is in use. What feature handles this transparently?

options.text: DynamoDB adaptive capacity automatically reallocates throughput to hot partitions (enabled by default in provisioned mode)

questions.explanation: DynamoDB adaptive capacity (mặc định) re-distribute throughput tới hot partition trong giới hạn table-level capacity. Giải quyết phần lớn hot partition trong thực tế. Nếu vẫn nóng → cần redesign PK (high cardinality, shard). On-demand mode auto-scale càng linh hoạt.

questions.question: A Lambda function processes events from an SQS queue. The team wants successful results published to an SNS topic and failures sent to a dedicated SQS queue for investigation. Which mechanism cleanly separates these?

options.text: Lambda Destinations with onSuccess (SNS) and onFailure (SQS); cleaner than DLQ for async invocations
Wrap in try/catch and call SNS/SQS manually from code

questions.explanation: Lambda Destinations cho async invoke: configure target on success (SNS/SQS/Lambda/EventBridge) và on failure separately. Destinations capture full invocation context. DLQ legacy chỉ failure, không có success path. Tuy nhiên SQS event source là sync invoke — destinations không apply, dùng SQS DLQ với maxReceiveCount.

questions.question: A Lambda function serves a customer-facing API. Cold start latency on the first invocation per minute is unacceptable (~3 seconds). Which feature eliminates cold starts at predictable cost?

options.text: Lambda Provisioned Concurrency, optionally with auto-scaling based on utilization

questions.explanation: Provisioned Concurrency keep N instances 'warm' — không cold start. Charge cho duration provisioned. Reserved Concurrency là rate limit (ngăn over-scale), không liên quan cold start. Memory chỉ giảm cold start phần nào. API Gateway cache là khác layer.

questions.question: A team stores user-uploaded files in S3. They want clients globally to upload to the nearest endpoint and S3 to handle replication transparently. Which feature?

options.text: S3 Multi-Region Access Points: single global endpoint that routes to the nearest bucket with active-active replication

questions.explanation: Multi-Region Access Points (MRAP) cung cấp single global endpoint, route request tới bucket gần nhất (latency-based) + failover khi region down. Combine với CRR active-active. CloudFront cache content nhưng không phải solution cho global write.

questions.question: AWS Backup vaults contain critical backups. The compliance team requires that no one (including root) can delete backups for 7 years. Which feature provides this?

options.text: Vault Lock in Compliance mode with minimum/maximum retention period; locked vault is immutable for the duration

questions.explanation: AWS Backup Vault Lock = WORM-like, Compliance mode locks even root from deleting/changing retention. Once locked + grace period passed (3 days), không thể unlock. Governance mode chỉ IAM được control. Phù hợp compliance SEC, FINRA, CFTC.

questions.question: An EFS file system is mounted across many EC2 instances in 3 AZs. The team wants lowest cost for rarely-accessed files. Which storage class enables auto-tiering?

options.text: EFS Standard with Lifecycle Management to move files to IA (Infrequent Access) after N days unaccessed
EFS One Zone (lowest cost but loses Multi-AZ resilience)

questions.explanation: EFS Lifecycle policy auto-move file unaccessed sau N days (7-90) tới IA storage class — giảm ~85% cost cho cold data, read-back có small fee. EFS One Zone cũng rẻ hơn nhưng kém resilient (single AZ). Lifecycle là default optimization.

questions.question: An EKS cluster has pods that need to access an S3 bucket. The team is evaluating IRSA (IAM Roles for Service Accounts) vs EKS Pod Identity. What is the KEY difference?

options.text: EKS Pod Identity uses an agent on each node (simpler, no OIDC provider per cluster); IRSA requires OIDC federation per cluster and JWT exchange

questions.explanation: EKS Pod Identity (2023+): EKS Pod Identity Agent DaemonSet trên mỗi node, không cần OIDC IdP per cluster. Đơn giản setup, reuse 1 role across clusters. IRSA dùng OIDC + JWT (chuẩn hơn cho cross-cluster identity), vẫn supported. Cả hai cùng tồn tại.

questions.question: An EKS application needs to scale pods based on SQS queue depth. HPA on CPU/memory is not sufficient. Which add-on/component?

options.text: KEDA (Kubernetes Event-driven Autoscaling) with AWS SQS ScaledObject — scales based on queue length

questions.explanation: KEDA = event-driven autoscaler. Hỗ trợ 50+ scalers: SQS, Kafka, CloudWatch metrics, Prometheus, etc. Scale deployment dựa trên external metric. HPA scale theo built-in resource metrics. Karpenter scale NODES (compute), không phải pods.

questions.question: An application uses CloudFront with multiple origins (primary S3 in us-east-1, secondary in us-west-2). If primary fails, CloudFront should automatically fall back to secondary. Which feature?

options.text: CloudFront Origin Failover with Origin Group: primary + secondary origin, retry on specific status codes (404, 500, 502, 503, 504)
Route 53 weighted DNS at the origin

questions.explanation: CloudFront Origin Failover: Origin Group với primary + secondary. Configure retry on status codes (5xx, 404, 403). CloudFront auto retry secondary nếu primary trả error. Native, no Lambda@Edge needed for simple failover.

questions.question: A DynamoDB table experiences unpredictable spikes from a marketing campaign. The team doesn't want to over-provision but needs to handle bursts without throttling. Which capacity mode?
questions.explanation: On-demand mode: no capacity planning, instant scaling, pay per actual request. Perfect cho unpredictable spike. Provisioned auto-scaling có lag (CloudWatch alarm → adjust → propagate). On-demand đắt hơn cho steady traffic, ngon cho burst.

questions.question: A team uses an ALB with target group health checks. Health checks marked instances unhealthy too aggressively during heavy load. Which target group setting should be tuned?

options.text: Increase HealthCheckIntervalSeconds, HealthyThresholdCount, UnhealthyThresholdCount; or adjust HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds

questions.explanation: ALB target group health check params: Interval (5-300s), Timeout (2-120s), HealthyThresholdCount, UnhealthyThresholdCount. Tăng threshold/timeout giảm false positives khi load. Trade-off: longer detection time for true failure. Tune theo SLO + load characteristics.

questions.question: An EKS cluster uses Cluster Autoscaler. The team migrated to Karpenter. What is the PRIMARY operational advantage?

options.text: Karpenter selects optimal instance type from many options (no pre-defined node groups), launches in seconds, supports spot/on-demand mix natively
Karpenter is cheaper to license (both are free)

questions.explanation: Karpenter dynamic instance selection từ instance families đáp ứng pod requirements (vs Cluster Autoscaler require pre-defined ASGs). Launch nhanh hơn, consolidation tốt hơn, native spot integration. Cả 2 free; Karpenter dùng IAM permissions để tạo EC2.

questions.question: A company replicates S3 data cross-region for DR. They want replication to start ONLY for new objects going forward, not historical data. Which feature?

options.text: S3 Replication is default 'new objects only'; existing objects not replicated unless you use Batch Replication
Always replicates all objects including historical
Replication is impossible for new objects only

questions.explanation: S3 Replication (CRR/SRR) chỉ replicate objects MỚI sau khi rule được enabled. Existing objects: cần Batch Replication (one-time job để replicate historical). Default behavior phù hợp khi chỉ cần forward DR coverage.

questions.question: A team designs a Multi-AZ application with stateless web tier + RDS Multi-AZ. They want chaos testing of AZ failure WITHOUT actually impacting production. Which AWS service?

options.text: AWS Fault Injection Service (FIS) with aws:ec2:terminate-instances + AWS Resilience Hub for assessment

questions.explanation: AWS FIS chaos engineering controlled: experiment template chọn targets (filter by tag/AZ), actions (terminate, throttle, stress), stop conditions (CloudWatch alarm → auto rollback). Resilience Hub assess design + RTO/RPO. Safe alternative to manual chaos.

questions.question: An application uses DynamoDB DAX for read caching. Some queries return stale data. What is the cause?

options.text: DAX serves from item cache (TTL configurable) and query cache; eventual consistency reads can return stale data — use strongly consistent reads if needed (bypasses DAX cache)

questions.explanation: DAX cache (item + query) trả về eventual consistency data trong TTL window. Strongly consistent read bypass DAX, gọi thẳng DynamoDB. Design choice: DAX trade consistency cho latency. Tune TTL hoặc dùng strongly consistent khi cần real-time.

questions.question: A team needs to replicate AWS Backup recovery points (e.g., EBS snapshots, RDS snapshots) to a different AWS account for an air-gapped DR scenario. Which feature?

options.text: AWS Backup cross-account copy via backup plans with destination vault in another account in the same Organization

questions.explanation: AWS Backup cross-account backup (Organizations integration required): backup plan rule với copy action tới vault ở destination account. Encryption với KMS key shared. Pattern DR + compliance isolation. Cross-region cũng tương tự.

questions.question: A team uses RDS Read Replicas to scale read traffic. Application reads occasionally return data older than 1 minute behind primary. What is happening?

options.text: Read Replica is asynchronous; replica lag depends on workload. Use CloudWatch ReplicaLag metric to monitor; consider Aurora replicas (sub-second lag) for tighter consistency

questions.explanation: RDS Read Replicas async replication, lag từ giây đến phút phụ thuộc write throughput. Aurora replicas có sub-second lag (storage layer replication). Multi-AZ standby KHÔNG phục vụ traffic. Monitor ReplicaLag CloudWatch metric.

questions.question: A team runs a stateful application on a single EC2 instance. They cannot easily refactor for HA but need rapid recovery. What is the LOWEST-effort HA improvement?

options.text: Put the instance in an Auto Scaling Group of min=1 max=1 across multiple subnets; ASG replaces failed instance automatically

questions.explanation: ASG min=max=1 cross-subnet AZs: nếu instance fail health check, ASG terminate + launch mới trong AZ healthy. Combine với EBS snapshots + user data restore script. Single-instance HA pattern cho legacy app, không cần refactor.

questions.question: A team needs an alarm that fires when the 5-minute average CPU is high AND the network throughput is also high (compound condition). Which CloudWatch feature?

options.text: CloudWatch Composite Alarm with rule expression ALARM(cpu_alarm) AND ALARM(network_alarm)
Lambda function evaluating multiple alarms manually

questions.explanation: Composite Alarms combine multiple alarms với boolean expression (AND, OR, NOT). Single notification khi compound state ALARM. Giảm noise của individual alarms, gửi actionable alert. Metric Math kết hợp metric data, không phải alarm state.

questions.question: A team wants to detect anomalies in API request latency that don't fit a fixed threshold (e.g., baseline varies by hour). Which CloudWatch feature?

options.text: CloudWatch Anomaly Detection: ML model trained on metric history; alarm when metric deviates from expected band

questions.explanation: CloudWatch Anomaly Detection xây dựng model học pattern hourly/daily/weekly. Alarm condition: metric outside band of N standard deviations. Tự thích nghi với baseline thay đổi. Phù hợp cho cyclical metrics (traffic giờ làm việc cao, đêm thấp).

questions.question: A team wants to identify top contributors (e.g., IP addresses generating most traffic, users causing most errors) from CloudWatch Logs in near real-time. Which feature?

options.text: CloudWatch Contributor Insights: analyzes log streams in real-time, surfaces top-N contributors based on configurable rules

questions.explanation: Contributor Insights real-time analytics trên logs/metric streams. Rule định nghĩa contributor (vd: từ JSON field clientIP), aggregator (Count, Sum). Trả về top-N. Logs Insights ad-hoc query, không real-time tracking.

questions.question: A team uses X-Ray for distributed tracing. They want a unified view of services + traces + metrics + logs in CloudWatch. Which feature provides this?

options.text: CloudWatch ServiceLens (X-Ray + CloudWatch integration showing service map with metrics + traces + logs)

questions.explanation: ServiceLens combine X-Ray service map + CloudWatch metrics/logs/alarms vào 1 view. Click node để thấy traces, error rate, latency, related logs. Single pane for observability. Yêu cầu X-Ray instrumentation + CloudWatch agent.

questions.question: A team wants to monitor real user experience (browser performance, JS errors, page load time) on their web app. Which AWS service?

options.text: CloudWatch RUM (Real User Monitoring) — JS snippet on pages, collects real user metrics
CloudWatch Synthetics canaries (synthetic, not real user)

questions.explanation: CloudWatch RUM: include lightweight JS snippet, collect Real User Metrics (Core Web Vitals, errors, sessions, page views). Bổ sung Synthetics (proactive, from synthetic locations). RUM cho insight production user thực.

questions.question: An organization wants to query CloudTrail across all accounts and regions with SQL, store events for 7 years, and analyze long-term trends. Which service?

options.text: CloudTrail Lake — managed data lake with SQL queries, configurable retention up to 7 years (or 10 with Lake)
Export CloudTrail logs to S3 and query with Athena

questions.explanation: CloudTrail Lake (managed data lake) ingest events từ multi-region/multi-account Organization, retention lên 10 năm, SQL query trực tiếp. Khác CloudTrail trail truyền thống (90-day history + S3 export). Lake giảm setup ETL phức tạp.

questions.question: A DevOps engineer wants to detect unusual API activity (e.g., spike in IAM CreateUser calls) and be alerted automatically. Which feature?

options.text: CloudTrail Insights detects abnormal management API activity using ML; emits Insight events to S3 and EventBridge

questions.explanation: CloudTrail Insights phân tích baseline API call volume + detect anomalies (vd: spike RunInstances bất thường). Emit Insight events. Subscribe qua EventBridge → SNS/Lambda. Bổ sung GuardDuty (rộng hơn về threat).

questions.question: A team manages 50 accounts and wants to deploy a standardized AWS Config conformance pack (set of Config rules) across all accounts. Which approach?

options.text: Deploy conformance pack from delegated administrator account targeting Organization, using AWS managed or custom rule template (YAML)
Manually create rules in each account

questions.explanation: Conformance pack = collection of Config rules + remediation actions trong YAML template. Deploy qua Organizations integration với delegated admin account → tự apply mọi account/region. Aggregator chỉ data, không apply rules.

questions.question: A team needs to troubleshoot 'Why can't EC2 instance A reach RDS instance B' across complex VPCs. Which AWS service traces network path?

options.text: VPC Reachability Analyzer (source/destination, analyzes security groups, NACLs, route tables, returns path or blocking config)

questions.explanation: Reachability Analyzer static analysis network path: SG rules, NACLs, route tables, peering, TGW. Trả về path nếu reachable hoặc resource block nếu không. Không gửi traffic thực. Khác Flow Logs (record actual flow).

questions.question: A security team wants to detect unintended network access paths (e.g., a public subnet inadvertently routing to a sensitive DB subnet) across all VPCs. Which feature?

options.text: VPC Network Access Analyzer — define network access scope, analyzer surfaces all paths matching the scope

questions.explanation: Network Access Analyzer: define Network Access Scope (Source = Internet, Destination = SensitiveSubnet). Tool list mọi network path matching scope. Catch misconfiguration (publicly-routable to private DB) at scale.

questions.question: A team operates on AWS and wants notifications for AWS-side events (planned maintenance, account-impacting issues). Which API + integration?

options.text: AWS Health API events → EventBridge → SNS / Slack / runbook automation

questions.explanation: AWS Health Dashboard + Health API emit events tới EventBridge: scheduled maintenance, accountnotification, account issues, public outages. EventBridge → SNS/Lambda automated response. Pattern operational awareness chuẩn.

questions.question: A team runs containers on EKS and wants per-container metrics (CPU, memory, network) + logs in CloudWatch with minimal setup. Which addon?

options.text: CloudWatch Observability EKS add-on (managed Fluent Bit + CloudWatch agent) — installs DaemonSets to ship metrics + logs

questions.explanation: Amazon CloudWatch Observability add-on cho EKS (managed by AWS): triển khai CloudWatch agent + Fluent Bit DaemonSet, Container Insights ON, application signals. One-click integration.

questions.question: A team operates a Lambda-based application and wants distributed tracing across Lambda + DynamoDB + SNS. Which instrumentation library is RECOMMENDED for new applications?

options.text: ADOT (AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry) — vendor-neutral, supports CloudWatch + X-Ray + other backends
X-Ray SDK only (still works, but ADOT is OTel-based future)

questions.explanation: ADOT là AWS distribution của OpenTelemetry — vendor-neutral, future-proof. Export traces/metrics tới X-Ray, CloudWatch, hoặc third-party. AWS recommend ADOT cho new apps. X-Ray SDK vẫn supported, dùng cho existing.

questions.question: A team needs to centralize CloudWatch Logs from 100+ accounts to a security account for long-term analysis. What is the MOST scalable setup?

options.text: Each source account creates a subscription filter forwarding logs to a Kinesis Data Stream / Firehose destination in the security account, then to S3 / OpenSearch

questions.explanation: CloudWatch Logs cross-account destinations: destination resource trong security account, source accounts attach subscription filter target destination. Forward sang Kinesis Stream/Firehose → S3/OpenSearch. Scalable cho 100+ accounts.

questions.question: A CloudWatch Logs Insights query is needed to find all log entries containing 'OutOfMemoryError' in the last hour, count by service. Which query syntax?

options.text: filter @message like /OutOfMemoryError/ | stats count(*) by service

questions.explanation: Logs Insights query language: filter (where), parse (extract field), stats (aggregate), sort. Có thể combine. Time range chọn ở UI. Trên scale Petabyte logs, query ngon hơn grep file thủ công.

questions.question: A team wants to publish custom application metrics (e.g., 'cart_abandonment_rate') with high cardinality (per user, per region). High-frequency calls to PutMetricData are expensive and rate-limited. Which approach is BEST?

options.text: Use Embedded Metric Format (EMF): write structured JSON logs with metric metadata; CloudWatch ingests as metrics from logs at no extra API cost
Use PutMetricData with batched 1000 metrics per call

questions.explanation: EMF: log structured JSON với _aws.CloudWatchMetrics descriptor. CloudWatch tự ingest as metrics khi log. Async, không rate limited như PutMetricData. Lib: aws-embedded-metrics-* SDK. Phù hợp cho high cardinality.

questions.question: A team uses CloudWatch Synthetics canaries to monitor a website. They want to capture screenshots on failure to debug. Which configuration?

options.text: Canary script uses synthetics.takeScreenshot() during workflow; screenshots stored in S3 + accessible from canary results

questions.explanation: Synthetics canary script (Node.js Puppeteer / Selenium / Playwright) support takeScreenshot() — lưu vào canary's S3 artifact bucket. Pair với CloudWatch alarm khi canary fail → on-call có visual evidence.

questions.question: A team wants real-time tail of CloudWatch Logs (similar to `tail -f`) without exporting. Which feature?

options.text: CloudWatch Logs Live Tail (real-time streaming of log events in the console)
Logs Insights query repeating every second
Export to S3 + tail S3 (no such API)

questions.explanation: Live Tail: real-time streaming via console (hoặc StartLiveTail API). Filter by log group, log stream, query terms. Pay per session minute. Phù hợp khi debug active issue.

questions.question: A team wants to track AWS account spending against monthly budget and get alerts at 50% / 80% / 100% usage. Which service?

options.text: AWS Budgets with budget alerts via SNS at threshold percentages
CloudWatch billing alarm only (no granular alerts)

questions.explanation: AWS Budgets: define cost/usage budget, set multiple alert thresholds (actual hoặc forecasted), notify via SNS/email. Granular alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%. CloudWatch billing alarm là 1 alarm đơn lẻ (us-east-1).

questions.question: An organization wants to track AWS resource changes (e.g., who modified a security group, when) with detailed history. Which AWS service is purpose-built for this?

options.text: AWS Config with detailed configuration item history per resource
CloudTrail (API call history, but not resource configuration state)

questions.explanation: AWS Config = configuration management database (CMDB): snapshot resource config theo time, history view, relationship graph. CloudTrail = API history (who called what), không track resource state. Cả hai bổ sung nhau.

questions.question: A team uses CloudWatch alarms with SNS notifications. They want alert message to include the metric value at alarm time and dynamic context. Which feature?

options.text: CloudWatch alarm description supports static text; for dynamic content use SNS → Lambda subscriber that fetches metric/context and reformats
CloudWatch alarms support templated SNS messages out-of-the-box
EventBridge with input transformer is the cleaner approach for dynamic templating

questions.explanation: EventBridge integration với CloudWatch alarm state change: rule input transformer customize message format dùng path syntax. Cleaner than Lambda formatting. SNS direct subscriber nhận message JSON nguyên gốc của alarm.

questions.question: A team needs to retain CloudWatch Logs for compliance (7 years) but most logs are rarely accessed after 30 days. Which strategy minimizes cost?

options.text: Set log group retention to 30 days; subscription filter exports older logs to S3 with Glacier Deep Archive lifecycle
Delete logs after 30 days, lose history

questions.explanation: CloudWatch Logs đắt ($0.50/GB stored). S3 Glacier Deep Archive ~$0.00099/GB-month. Pattern: subscription filter → Kinesis Firehose → S3; log group retention ngắn (30 days hot search), S3 lifecycle Deep Archive cho long-term compliance.

questions.question: An organization wants to manage on-call rotations, escalation paths, runbooks, and post-incident reviews natively in AWS. Which service?

options.text: AWS Systems Manager Incident Manager — response plans, escalation, runbooks, post-incident analysis

questions.explanation: SSM Incident Manager: response plans (escalation contacts/teams), runbooks (SSM Automation), engagement engines (SMS, voice, email, chat), timeline + post-incident analysis. Native end-to-end incident lifecycle.

questions.question: Operations teams need a single dashboard aggregating operational items (CloudWatch alarms, Config changes, EventBridge events) for triage. Which service?

options.text: Systems Manager OpsCenter aggregates OpsItems from multiple sources for centralized triage

questions.explanation: SSM OpsCenter: create OpsItems từ CloudWatch alarms, EventBridge events, Config rules, GuardDuty findings, Security Hub. Assign owner, runbook link, status. Single triage queue cho ops team.

questions.question: A team wants Slack-based ChatOps with approvals (e.g., run an SSM runbook from chat with team approval). Which service?

options.text: AWS Chatbot — Slack/Microsoft Teams integration, supports CLI commands and approval workflows

questions.explanation: AWS Chatbot connect Slack/MS Teams channel với AWS services. SNS/EventBridge notifications post tới channel. CLI in chat (aws ... commands), approval workflows. Reduces context switching.

questions.question: A team uses SNS topics with multiple subscribers. They want different subscribers to receive different subsets of messages based on attributes (e.g., 'severity=critical' → on-call SMS; 'severity=warn' → email). Which feature?

options.text: SNS Message Filtering Policy on each subscription (JSON policy matching message attributes)
Multiple SNS topics, one per severity

questions.explanation: SNS Filter Policy (JSON) trên subscription: SNS chỉ deliver message nếu attributes match policy. Native fan-out filtering. Tránh tạo nhiều topic. Subscriber có thể subscribe cùng topic với filter khác nhau.

questions.question: An application uses SQS FIFO queue for ordered message processing. Messages with the same MessageGroupId must process in order. What is the implication for concurrency?

options.text: Within a MessageGroupId, processing is strictly ordered (single consumer at a time); different MessageGroupIds can process in parallel
All messages in queue are serial

questions.explanation: SQS FIFO MessageGroupId định nghĩa ordering boundary. SQS deliver tin nhắn cùng MessageGroupId tuần tự cho 1 consumer. Group khác có thể parallel. Để max parallelism, dùng nhiều MessageGroupId (vd: userId).

questions.question: A team wants to integrate a third-party SaaS (e.g., Datadog) sending events to AWS so that AWS resources react. Which feature?

options.text: EventBridge Partner Event Source — third-party services publish to a partner event source, then route via EventBridge rules

questions.explanation: EventBridge Partner Sources: 35+ SaaS partners (Datadog, Auth0, MongoDB, PagerDuty) publish events natively tới EventBridge. AWS account associate Partner Source, create rules. Cleaner than custom webhook.

questions.question: A team needs to transform events from a source (e.g., DynamoDB Stream) and enrich them before sending to a target. Which EventBridge feature provides built-in source-to-target piping with optional enrichment?

options.text: EventBridge Pipes — direct source-to-target with filter + enrich (Lambda/Step Functions/API destination) + transform

questions.explanation: EventBridge Pipes: 1:1 integration source (DynamoDB Stream, Kinesis, SQS, MQ, Kafka) → optional filter → optional enrich (Lambda, SFN, API dest) → target. Replace boilerplate Lambda glue code. Native, fully managed.

questions.question: A Step Functions workflow needs to retry a Task with exponential backoff up to 5 times, but limit max delay between retries to 60 seconds. Which Retry fields?

options.text: Use Wait state in a loop

questions.explanation: Retry field hỗ trợ: IntervalSeconds (1st retry delay), MaxAttempts, BackoffRate (multiplier), MaxDelaySeconds (cap), JitterStrategy. Full control. Tránh wait loop tay.

questions.question: An EventBridge Scheduler runs a Lambda every hour. Sometimes Lambda fails silently. The team wants automatic retry + DLQ for failed invocations. How?

options.text: Configure retry policy and Dead Letter Queue (SQS) on the schedule's target settings

questions.explanation: EventBridge Scheduler target có retry policy (max retries, max event age) + DLQ (SQS) cho failed invocations. Native fault tolerance. Step Functions wrapper là overkill cho simple retry.

questions.question: A team automates compliance: when AWS Config rule reports S3 bucket without encryption, automatically remediate by enabling default encryption. What is the cleanest setup?

options.text: AWS Config rule with associated Remediation Action pointing to SSM Automation document AWS-EnableS3BucketEncryption with auto-remediate enabled

questions.explanation: Pattern Config Remediation Action: gắn SSM Automation document tới rule, map params từ resource non-compliant, optional auto-remediate. AWS-managed automation docs có sẵn cho phổ biến case. Lambda from scratch không cần thiết.

questions.question: A team runs a Lambda function as HTTP webhook receiver. They want to expose it without provisioning API Gateway. Which feature?

options.text: Lambda Function URL — built-in HTTPS endpoint without API Gateway
Lambda doesn't expose HTTP without API Gateway

questions.explanation: Lambda Function URL: HTTPS endpoint native, không cần API Gateway. Auth: NONE hoặc AWS_IAM. Simpler/cheaper cho webhook đơn giản, không cần advanced API Gateway features (caching, throttling, transformation).

questions.question: An incident requires running an SSM Automation runbook ACROSS multiple AWS accounts (vd: snapshot every EC2 in Org). Which feature?

options.text: SSM Automation execution with TargetLocations (cross-account/cross-region multi-execution)
Use Step Functions to loop through accounts

questions.explanation: SSM Automation Multi-Account/Multi-Region: define TargetLocations (account list or Organization, region list). Execute runbook concurrently across accounts với centralized status. Requires execution role trong target accounts.

questions.question: An EventBridge rule must filter events where 'detail.amount' is between 100 and 1000. Which pattern syntax supports this?
questions.explanation: EventBridge content-based filtering hỗ trợ numeric matcher: numeric với operator (>, >=, <, <=) và values. Cũng có anything-but, exists, prefix, suffix, equals-ignore-case. Lambda filter là overkill.

questions.question: Step Functions Standard Workflow processes long-running orders (24 hours, many steps). Express Workflow runs short-lived high-volume webhooks. Which is correct on the differences?

options.text: Standard: durable, up to 1 year execution; Express: up to 5 minutes, higher throughput, lower cost per execution, logged to CloudWatch Logs

questions.explanation: Standard: long-running (≤1 năm), exactly-once, durable state. Express: ≤5 phút, at-least-once async / sync, optimized cho high-volume / low-latency (vd: streaming, mobile backend), không lưu execution detail (chỉ logs).

questions.question: A team wants to send notifications when an Amazon S3 bucket policy changes. Which event source provides near-real-time notification?

options.text: CloudTrail emits PutBucketPolicy event → EventBridge rule → SNS topic
S3 Event Notifications (only for object events, not bucket-level policy)

questions.explanation: S3 Event Notifications cho object events (created, deleted, etc.), không bucket-level config. Bucket policy change ghi nhận trong CloudTrail (PutBucketPolicy). EventBridge match event → notify. Near-realtime (~giây).

questions.question: A team uses Step Functions with a Map state to process 1000 items in parallel. They want to limit concurrency to 50 simultaneous Lambda invocations to avoid throttling downstream. Which configuration?

options.text: Set MaxConcurrency: 50 on the Map state
Set Lambda reserved concurrency to 50 (also valid, but more permanent)
Use a Wait state between items
Map state has no concurrency control

questions.explanation: Map state MaxConcurrency field giới hạn số iteration parallel. 0 = no limit (default inline Map = 40 max). Distributed Map có MaxConcurrency cao hơn. Lambda reserved concurrency là permanent limit, ảnh hưởng mọi caller, kém linh hoạt.

questions.question: A team uses Lambda for high-volume event processing. Some events cause errors that should retry up to 3 times, then move to DLQ for manual review. The Lambda is invoked asynchronously by EventBridge. Where is retry/DLQ configured?

options.text: Lambda function event invoke config: MaximumRetryAttempts (0-2, default 2) + on-failure destination (SQS as DLQ) for async invocations

questions.explanation: Async Lambda invocation config: MaxRetryAttempts (default 2, max 2 → tổng 3 lần thử), MaxEventAge, OnFailure (SQS/SNS/Lambda/EventBridge destination). EventBridge target retry policy là separate layer. Combine cho fine control.

questions.question: An incident response procedure requires isolating a compromised EC2 instance from network instantly. Which steps automate this safely?

options.text: SSM Automation runbook: detach IAM instance profile + replace security groups with a 'quarantine' SG (no egress/ingress) + create EBS snapshot for forensics

questions.explanation: Quarantine pattern: replace SG (network isolated), detach IAM profile (prevent further AWS API misuse), snapshot EBS (forensic evidence). EC2 vẫn running để giữ memory/processes nếu cần memory dump. AWS có sample automation docs cho việc này.

questions.question: A team uses AWS Step Functions to orchestrate an ETL pipeline. One step calls a third-party API that has a 429 (Too Many Requests) rate limit. Which Retry config handles this gracefully?

options.text: Retry { ErrorEquals: ['States.TaskFailed'] with caught error matching '429', IntervalSeconds: 2, BackoffRate: 2.0, MaxAttempts: 5 }

questions.explanation: Retry với BackoffRate 2 (exponential): 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s. ErrorEquals match specific error (vd: custom error name). MaxAttempts 5 đủ để vượt qua rate limit window. Pattern dù third-party API throttle.

questions.question: A team wants to centralize alerting from multiple AWS sources (CloudWatch alarms, GuardDuty findings, Health events) to a single Slack channel with deduplication. Architecture?

options.text: Each source → EventBridge (or SNS) → single Lambda fan-in → AWS Chatbot Slack integration with rate-limiting/dedup logic in Lambda
Subscribe Slack to every SNS topic directly

questions.explanation: Fan-in pattern: nguồn → 1 hub Lambda/Chatbot. Lambda có thể dedupe (DynamoDB TTL cache), format, route. AWS Chatbot là last-mile to Slack. Direct SNS Slack tạo noise và không có dedup.

questions.question: A team needs scheduled tasks (cron-like) that survive AWS region failure (vd: must run trong us-west-2 nếu us-east-1 down). Which approach is BEST?

options.text: Deploy EventBridge Scheduler in multiple regions; coordinate via DynamoDB Global Table to ensure single execution
Single region scheduler with backup region

questions.explanation: EventBridge Scheduler regional service. Multi-region cron HA pattern: scheduler trong N region, target Lambda check distributed lock trong DynamoDB Global Table (conditional write trên 'last_run_timestamp') để ensure single execution. Hoặc accept idempotent target.

questions.question: A team wants to gracefully drain ECS Fargate tasks during deployment to ensure in-flight requests complete. Which configuration helps?

options.text: ALB target group deregistration delay + ECS service stopTimeout container property + signal handlers in app (SIGTERM)

questions.explanation: Graceful drain: ALB deregistration delay (target stops accepting new conn, drain existing). ECS gửi SIGTERM tới container, đợi stopTimeout (default 30s) rồi SIGKILL. App phải catch SIGTERM, complete in-flight requests, close. Pattern zero-downtime deploy.

questions.question: A team wants to identify IAM roles in their account that have access to S3 buckets in EXTERNAL accounts (cross-account exposure). Which service detects this?

options.text: IAM Access Analyzer — external access findings for resource policies (S3, IAM, KMS, Lambda, SQS, Secrets Manager)

questions.explanation: IAM Access Analyzer (free): scan resource-based policies trong account/Organization, identify access từ external principals (account, public). Generate findings actionable. Hỗ trợ 8+ resource types. Cũng có policy validation + unused access analyzer.

questions.question: A team uses IAM Identity Center to assign permissions across the Organization. They want HR's permissions to vary by department (department=Engineering vs Finance), encoded in the identity provider. Which feature?

options.text: Attribute-Based Access Control (ABAC) in IAM Identity Center: pass attributes from IdP as session tags, reference in permission set policy
Create one permission set per department (many)

questions.explanation: ABAC: Identity Center pass IdP attributes (vd: department, costCenter) as session tags. Permission set policy reference aws:PrincipalTag/department, allow theo tag. Scale: 1 permission set cho mọi department, đỡ duplicate.

questions.question: An organization wants to delegate AWS Config administration from the management account to a security-focused member account. Which feature?

options.text: Register a delegated administrator for AWS Config service in AWS Organizations

questions.explanation: AWS Organizations cho phép register Delegated Administrator cho nhiều services (Config, Security Hub, GuardDuty, Macie, IAM Access Analyzer, etc.). Member account đó có quyền admin cho service đó cross-org. Reduce reliance trên management account.

questions.question: A KMS customer-managed key (CMK) is used across us-east-1 and eu-west-1 for the same encrypted data. Manual cross-region key replication is operational burden. Which feature solves this?

options.text: KMS multi-Region keys (MRKs) — same key material across regions, same key ID, independent policies; encrypt in one, decrypt in another

questions.explanation: KMS Multi-Region Keys: replica keys ở regions khác share key material, có cùng Key ID (with mrk- prefix). Encrypt at region A → decrypt at region B without re-encrypt. Phù hợp cho global DR + S3 CRR với SSE-KMS.

questions.question: A KMS CMK has both a key policy and an attached IAM policy on the role. The key policy denies all access except to root account. The IAM policy allows kms:Decrypt. Can the role decrypt?

options.text: No — key policy is authoritative; if key policy doesn't grant access to the role (or to IAM principals in general), IAM policy alone cannot grant access

questions.explanation: KMS key policy MUST allow access; IAM policy alone không đủ. Pattern phổ biến: key policy allow root + 'kms:CreateGrant' để IAM policies có thể thêm permission. Nếu key policy strict, role không decrypt được.

questions.question: A team uses Secrets Manager for an Oracle database password (not RDS). They want automatic rotation every 90 days. What is needed?

options.text: Custom Lambda rotation function implementing the rotation steps (createSecret, setSecret, testSecret, finishSecret) configured with the secret
RDS automated rotation handles all DBs

questions.explanation: Secrets Manager native rotation cho RDS/Aurora/DocumentDB/Redshift. Cho Oracle on EC2 hoặc non-AWS DB, viết Lambda rotation function với 4 step pattern: createSecret (new version), setSecret (apply to DB), testSecret, finishSecret (move AWSCURRENT label).

questions.question: GuardDuty discovers a Trojan in an EC2 instance via EBS volume scanning. Which feature performs malware detection?

options.text: GuardDuty Malware Protection — scans EBS volumes attached to EC2 / Lambda / containers on findings or on-demand

questions.explanation: GuardDuty Malware Protection scan EBS volume (sao chép snapshot + scan signature). Trigger từ GuardDuty finding hoặc on-demand. Native, không cần install agent. Đáng kể nâng visibility threats.

questions.question: A team wants continuous scanning of all EC2 instances, ECR repos, and Lambda functions for software vulnerabilities. Which service handles all three?

options.text: Amazon Inspector v2 (continuous scanning for EC2, ECR, Lambda)

questions.explanation: Inspector v2 continuous, agentless cho ECR, SSM-agent based cho EC2, snapshot scan cho Lambda. CVE database + AWS findings. Centralized findings in Security Hub. V1 deprecated.

questions.question: A team runs Macie discovery jobs and notices cost is high because it re-scans the same buckets repeatedly. Which optimization is recommended?

options.text: Use one-time discovery jobs for snapshots + enable automated sensitive data discovery for ongoing coverage (samples objects intelligently, lower cost)
Scan more frequently for cost reduction

questions.explanation: Macie automated sensitive data discovery (newer feature) sample objects intelligently, cover toàn bộ account/Org với cost predictable thấp hơn full one-time job. Combine: one-time deep scan + automated daily.

questions.question: A compliance team requires PCI DSS controls visible. Which AWS service provides a control-by-control mapping with continuous compliance checks?

options.text: AWS Security Hub with PCI DSS standard enabled — maps Config rules and other controls to PCI requirements

questions.explanation: Security Hub có pre-built standards: AWS Foundational Security Best Practices, CIS AWS Benchmarks, PCI DSS, NIST. Mỗi standard map control → automated checks. Compliance dashboard, score, failed controls. Native compliance reporting.

questions.question: An organization wants central management of WAF rules across 100 accounts, automatically applying a baseline WAF web ACL to every CloudFront and ALB. Which service?

options.text: AWS Firewall Manager — policies for WAF, Shield Advanced, security groups, Network Firewall across Organization

questions.explanation: Firewall Manager (FMS): central manage WAF/Shield/SG/Network Firewall/DNS Firewall qua Organizations. Define policy ở Firewall Manager admin account, auto-apply tới resources matching tag/account. Continuous enforcement.

questions.question: An application needs to filter network traffic at VPC level with stateful inspection (e.g., deep packet inspection, intrusion prevention). Which service?

options.text: AWS Network Firewall (stateful/stateless inspection at VPC level with Suricata-compatible rules)
Security Group (stateful but limited to L4)

questions.explanation: AWS Network Firewall managed VPC-level firewall: stateful rules (Suricata format), stateless rules, IDS/IPS, deep packet inspection. SG/NACL hoạt động L3/L4 đơn giản. WAF L7 HTTP, không phải L3.

questions.question: A team has an API Gateway endpoint exposed publicly. They want to throttle abusive clients dynamically (vd: >1000 req/5 min = block). Which feature?

options.text: AWS WAF rate-based rule (count requests by IP within 5-minute window, block when threshold exceeded)
API Gateway usage plan (per API key, not per IP)

questions.explanation: WAF rate-based rule: tự track request rate per IP (5-min window), block when exceeds threshold. Dynamic, automated. API Gateway usage plan dùng API key, không applicable cho anon abuse. Lambda authorizer cho mỗi request là tốn kém.

questions.question: A team wants to use AWS-managed WAF rules to protect against common threats (SQL injection, XSS, bad bots) without manually writing rules. Which feature?

options.text: AWS Managed Rule Groups (e.g., AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet, AWSManagedRulesSQLiRuleSet, AWSManagedRulesBotControlRuleSet)

questions.explanation: WAF Managed Rule Groups: maintained bởi AWS (free hoặc paid). Common, Known Bad Inputs, SQLi, Anonymous IP list, Bot Control, Account Takeover Prevention, Fraud Control. One-click add. AWS update threat signatures.

questions.question: A team needs to perform a compliance audit, requiring evidence-of-control collection (vd: 'show all KMS key rotation enabled'). Which service automates evidence gathering?

options.text: AWS Audit Manager — assessment frameworks (PCI, GDPR, HIPAA, SOC, custom) automatically collect evidence from Config/CloudTrail/Security Hub
AWS Artifact (compliance reports for AWS, not customer workloads)

questions.explanation: AWS Audit Manager: pre-built frameworks + custom. Automatically map controls → AWS API calls / Config / CloudTrail. Continuous evidence collection. Assessment report exportable cho auditor. Artifact là cho AWS's own compliance docs.

questions.question: An auditor requires AWS SOC 2 Type II report. Where to download?

options.text: AWS Artifact (self-service portal for AWS compliance reports: SOC, ISO, PCI, FedRAMP, etc.)

questions.explanation: AWS Artifact: self-service downloads of AWS Compliance reports (SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001/27017/27018, PCI DSS, FedRAMP, HIPAA, etc.). Cần NDA acceptance trong console. Khác Audit Manager (customer's own compliance audit).

questions.question: A VPC endpoint (Gateway type for S3) is used to keep traffic private. The team wants to restrict that only specific S3 buckets can be accessed via this endpoint. Which feature?

options.text: VPC endpoint policy on the gateway endpoint (resource-based JSON policy with Allow/Deny for specific buckets)
Security group on endpoint (gateway endpoints don't use SGs)

questions.explanation: VPC endpoint policy IAM JSON: control resource (bucket/prefix) cho phép qua endpoint. Defense-in-depth combined with bucket policy. Gateway endpoint không có SG (use endpoint policy). Interface endpoint có SG + endpoint policy.

questions.question: A vendor needs to assume a role in your AWS account to manage resources on your behalf. To prevent confused deputy attacks (vendor's other clients accidentally accessing your account), what should the trust policy include?

options.text: Condition with sts:ExternalId requiring a unique secret you and the vendor share

questions.explanation: External ID: unique secret bạn cung cấp cho vendor. Vendor MUST pass ExternalId trong AssumeRole call. Mitigate confused deputy: vendor's other clients không thể assume role nếu không biết ExternalId. AWS recommended cho third-party access.

questions.question: An IAM role's exposed credentials were detected (via GitHub scanning). AWS automatically applied a quarantine policy. What policy was attached?

options.text: AWSCompromisedKeyQuarantineV2 (or similar AWS-managed policy that denies most powerful actions while allowing the user to rotate keys)

questions.explanation: AWS detect exposed key (qua scanning hợp tác), attach AWSCompromisedKeyQuarantineV2 (deny high-risk actions like create IAM, create EC2 large, etc., nhưng allow rotate key, list, basic read). Email notify + AWS Health event. User PHẢI rotate key + remove policy.

questions.question: An Organizations SCP attached to an OU denies s3:DeleteBucket. A member account's user has IAM policy allowing s3:* on all resources. Can the user delete a bucket?

options.text: No — SCP is the maximum permissions ceiling; even Allow in IAM cannot grant what SCP denies

questions.explanation: SCP định permission ceiling cho account. IAM policy bên trong cho phép quyền nằm TRONG ceiling đó. SCP Deny luôn thắng. Root user trong account cũng không bypass SCP. Đây là cốt lõi của centralized governance.

questions.question: A team uses CloudHSM for FIPS 140-2 Level 3 hardware security module. They want CloudFormation to provision an HSM cluster automatically. Which resource type?

options.text: HSM cannot be provisioned with CFN

questions.explanation: CloudFormation hỗ trợ AWS::CloudHSMv2::Cluster + AWS::CloudHSMv2::Hsm. Tự động hóa provision cluster + HSM ở subnets. Post-create cần initialize (CO setup, crypto user) qua AWS CLI / CloudHSM client.

questions.question: A team needs to identify which IAM roles in their account have NOT been used in the last 90 days (to revoke). Which tool?

options.text: IAM Access Analyzer — Unused Access feature finds inactive users/roles/permissions

questions.explanation: IAM Access Analyzer 'Unused Access analyzer': identify inactive IAM users, roles, access keys, permissions (Lambda, S3). Recommendations để clean up. Pay-per-analyzer cost. Native discovery without manual CloudTrail dig.

questions.question: A team wants to enforce MFA for IAM users when calling sensitive APIs (vd: deleting S3 bucket). Which condition key?

options.text: aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent in IAM policy condition (allow action only when true)

questions.explanation: IAM policy condition aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent (boolean) — true khi caller authenticated với MFA. Pattern: deny sensitive action if not MFA: { "Condition": { "BoolIfExists": { "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent": "false" } } }.

questions.question: A team uses GuardDuty and wants to automatically respond to a finding 'CryptoCurrency:EC2/BitcoinTool.B!DNS' (instance contacting crypto-mining DNS). What is the recommended automated response?

options.text: EventBridge rule on GuardDuty finding → SSM Automation runbook to quarantine instance (replace SG, detach IAM, snapshot EBS) + create OpsCenter ticket

questions.explanation: Pattern automated incident response: GuardDuty → EventBridge → SSM Automation quarantine + SNS notify + OpsCenter ops item. AWS có sample runbooks (AWSConfigRemediation-*, AWS-StopEC2Instance). Quan trọng: snapshot trước khi quarantine để forensics.
